title: Crazy Zoo Monkey
description: Crazy Zoo Monkey is a chaotic sandbox romp where you step into the cage as a mischievous monkey and decide how to handle curious visitors. You grab, throw, eat, or smash whatever’s nearby while humans react in funny, friendly, or aggressive ways.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Sudoku
description: Sudoku is a relaxing yet challenging number puzzle game made for Jio feature phones. Fill the 9×9 grid with numbers 1 to 9 without repeating any in a row, column, or 3×3 box. Choose from different difficulty levels and test your logic skills. The game works offline, saves your progress automatically, and offers smooth performance with clean visuals for KaiOS devices.

title: Robby: Bomberman
description:
Dive into an exciting adventure with Robby, a brave hero who finds himself trapped in a labyrinth filled with ghosts and mysterious loot boxes. In this danger-filled world, to unlock the exit, Robby must defeat all the ghosts and destroy the crates, which may contain precious coins and useful bonuses.

But Robby is not alone in his fight! He has a loyal ally—a magical mushroom that can emerge from the loot boxes to assist him in battles against the ghosts.

title: Cube Drop Puzzle
description:
Colorful bears are waiting to splash water!

Welcome to Cube Drop Puzzle!

Are you ready to start puzzle solving? Play Cube Drop Puzzle now and make a splash!

title: Latutu Holiday Gift Hunt
description: Latutu’s Holiday Gift Hunt is a cheerful matching game where you search through a pile of cute holiday toys and gifts to find three identical items. Drag each match into your slots to create a trio and clear space for more. With its cozy holiday theme, adorable Latutu characters, and satisfying match-and-clear gameplay, this game offers a relaxing yet exciting experience for all ages. Perfect for short sessions or high-score chasing during the festive season.

title: Journey Of Escape
description: Escape games have always been a popular genre among puzzle enthusiasts and adventure seekers. They challenge players to think critically, solve intricate puzzles, and uncover hidden secrets while racing against time. "Journey of Escape" is an immersive collection of escape games designed to test your intelligence

title: Cooking Cafe Food Chef
description:
Prepare and cook delicious food from all over the world in Cooking Cafe Story. Build the cafe of your dreams while serving hot meals to hungry customers at a fast pace! Don't let the time run out, practice your time management skills, and experience the craze of real cooking!

Dash from cafe's to restaurants and unlock many locations as your progress on your journey. This cooking game offers endless fun levels with challenging missions set up in each level to give you that special experience!

title: Jungle Solitaire
description: Jungle Spider Solitaire is an adaptation of the classic card game Spider Solitaire with a jungle theme. It is optimized for short games and encourages strategic planning of moves with an original system of collecting diamonds.

title: Mind Gambit
description: Mind Gambit is a relaxing puzzle game inspired by the classic Peg Solitaire. Plan your moves carefully to jump and remove pegs until only one remains. There’s no timer, just pure strategy and thoughtful gameplay. With unlimited levels, the challenge never ends.

title: Magic Christmas Tree Match-3
description: Magic Christmas Tree Match-3 is a free New Year's match-3 game where you'll complete vibrant levels, create combinations of three or more, earn bonuses, and help the heroes decorate the festive town. Solve match-3 puzzles, combine elements, use power-ups, explosions, and super combos to complete tasks faster and advance the story.

title: Luxury Highway Cars
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning luxury cars with insane speed limits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Luxury Highway Cars!

title: Winter Wonderland Mahjong
description: Escape into a cozy Winter Wonderland filled with snowflakes, penguins, and festive cheer! Relax with calming music as you match beautifully crafted tiles in this soothing Mahjong puzzle game. Unlock charming new backgrounds and unique tile designs as you progress, each adding warmth and wonder to your journey. Perfect for unwinding, celebrating the holidays, and discovering the magic of winter—one match at a time.

title: Happy Bubbles
description: Boom! Hear that pop? The bubbles are calling! This classic bubble shooter blends quick reflexes with clever strategy. Spin the Lucky Wheel for extra rewards, claim weekly bonus and dive into a bright, cute world that never runs out of fun.

title: Obby - Escape Barry's jail parkour
description: An incredible escape from the New Barry Prison awaits you! Cool locations, parkour and obby. Show your agility to avoid getting caught by Barry.

title: Air Strike 2D
description: Become a bomber pilot and fly an army airplane in epic air strikes! Drop bombs, destroy tanks, cannons and soldiers, intercept missiles and shoot down drones. Eliminate enemy troops and destroy their military bases. Upgrade your aircraft with deadly weapons and cool gear. Dominate the battlefield from the sky and defeat the villain general in a final airstrike!

title: Super Pop Blast
description: Get ready for a new kind of brick shooter, with unique mechanics, rewarding challenges, and colorful levels. The object: Clear all the blocks using a limited number of balls. Plan your moves, use the score combo system, and try to get 3 stars!

title: sprunki clicker & merge phase 3
description: Sprunki Clicker & Merge: Phase 3 is an exciting rhythm-based idle game where you tap to earn money and unlock new Sprunki creatures! Each Sprunki has a unique musical beat, and as you merge them, you create richer, more dynamic melodies. Grow your collection, upgrade your beats, and become the ultimate Sprunki maestro!

title: TCG Card Clicker
description: TCG Card Clicker is an addictive clicker game inspired by TCG Card Shop Simulator, where collecting never stops! Click to earn coins, open card packs, and expand your collection with over 8000 unique cards. Each card boosts your passive income, letting you earn more even when you're not clicking! Trade duplicates to discover new cards and complete your ultimate collection. Can you find the rarest cards and become the ultimate collector

title: FPS Toy Realism
description: This new shooter offers a unique experience of team battles on a large 12x12 map. Thanks to the excellent shooting feel and precise shooting mechanics, every shot feels realistic and exciting. The game features a weapon purchasing system similar to popular shooters, allowing you to select and customize your arsenal before the fight for maximum effectiveness. Support items such as medkits and rockets are available to help you quickly restore health or destroy enemies with powerful rocket volleys.

title: Hexa Sort Trick or Treat
description: Step into a haunted puzzle realm where glowing hexagonal blocks hide within a web of spooky challenges. Your task: sort eerie, color-coded pieces into their rightful places before the shadows close in. With every drag and drop, you’ll sharpen your wits and unravel chillingly clever layouts that grow trickier as you progress. Easy to pick up yet devilishly addictive, this Halloween brain-teaser will keep players of all ages spellbound through hundreds of spooky levels.

title: People Playground: Ragdoll Battle
description:
Welcome to People Playground: Ragdoll Battle!
Carefully control your character to strike the right spots on your opponent’s body. Attack strategically to destroy and crush your enemies. Earn gold coins to unlock new characters and upgrade your skills.
Have fun and dominate the arena!

title: Typing Adventure
description: Get ready for a fast-paced typing challenge in Typing Adventure! Type the words above each enemy to defeat them before they get too close. The longer you survive, the faster they come! How long can your fingers keep up? Battle endless waves and test your speed in this thrilling typing survival game!

title: Katana
description:
It's a first-person Katana game!
Slice all the enemy ninjas into small pieces and save the hostages. Use multiple katana swords and shurikens. Fight epic bosses and complete the levels.

title: C.A.P.
description:
Take to the skies and protect the carrier in this shooter inspired by WW2 dogfights. 
Dodge enemy fighters, protect your aircraft carrier, and blast through waves of incoming planes. 
Remember to come back to the carrier to refuel!
With crisp pixel-art 3D visuals and one-touch controls, this shooter delivers satisfying action perfect for short play.

title: Hungry Noob: Cafe Simulator
description:
Get ready for an exciting adventure with Noob and his chef friend, who have decided to turn an abandoned building into a top cafe!
Whether they succeed or not depends only on you!
Launch and play Hungry Noob: Cafe Simulator!

title: Break a Lucky Egg Brainrots
description: Break a Lucky Egg Brainrots is a fast and rewarding collection game where action, risk, and strategy come together. Your mission is to break brainrot eggs, collect rare Brainrot characters, and safely deliver them to your base before time runs out. Each run is a mix of decision making and reflex.

title: Pirate Paradise
description: Pirate Paradise is a fun and relaxing game where you have to match three identical items in a row. Help the pirates sort the items into portals. The difficulty of the game will gradually increase and there will be more and more items.

title: Quizmania: Trivia game
description: Sharpen your mind across exciting levels. Answer a variety of questions from different topics and use strategic hints to guide your way. As you progress, the difficulty increases, offering a rewarding and challenging experience with every round.

title: Slingshot Fortress
description: Slingshot Fortress is an addictive 2D physics-based destruction game where precision, timing, and strategy are essential. Use your slingshot to launch stones, bombs, and shurikens to destroy towers, collapse structures, and uncover hidden enemies. Explore vibrant levels from forests to icy lands, unlock powerful abilities, trigger explosive chain reactions, and master increasingly challenging puzzles in this fun, casual browser game experience.

title: Meow Block: Color Collect!
description: A burst of color, clever thinking, and adorable cats await you in Meow Block: Color Collect! This charming puzzle experience turns simple movements into brain-teasing fun, where every swipe matters and every match brings you closer to victory.

title: Hot & Cold Winter Style
description: Princesses Eliza and Milana are going on winter vacation, but for each of the girls, winter vacation will be special. Eliza lives in snowy regions and loves fluffy fur coats, warm scarves and winter dresses. Milana celebrates her holidays under palm trees and chooses swimsuits, light capes and bright accessories. Players will have to create stylish images, combining the cold shine of snow and the warm glow of the tropics. Help Eliza and Milana become the most fashionable princesses of winter!

title: Two Archers: Bow Duel
description: Get ready for a great battle at the Archery Tournament, because no one is going to just give up and let you win. With each new battle, your enemies will only become stronger. But you shouldn't stay put either. Buy new equipment. A huge selection of different bows will help you defeat your enemies, from simple wooden ones to magical golden bows with incendiary arrows! Earn money by participating in the tournament.

title: Limited Defense
description:
Limited Defense is a strategic tower defense game where you command bandits, archers, and explosive towers to hold back relentless waves of enemies. Face off against mischievous Green Slimes, fearsome Orcs, and towering bosses like the Boss King Slime. Upgrade your defenses, unlock legendary warriors, and test your tactical skills in intense, fast-paced battles!
Can you make it in this tower defense game?

title: My Arcade Center
description: My Arcade Center is a fast-paced management game where you build and expand your own arcade. Earn tokens by day, upgrade machines by night, hire staff, use coin bots, and handle freeloaders and vandals. Unlock new machines, optimize layouts, manage customer behavior, and progress through 9 handcrafted maps for long-term growth.

title: Resident Evil: Purge Operation
description: At the start of each level, players must quickly locate powerful weapons like the shotgun and sniper rifle, crucial for fending off hordes of zombies. Once the eerie alarm sounds, grotesque, ferocious undead flood the area. A single mistake can lead to being swarmed, so precise marksmanship, agile movement, and calm judgment are essential for survival.​

title: Hidden Object Farm Adventure
description: Play a fun hidden object game with 30 farm levels! each level, find 6 hidden things before time runs out. If you need help, use a hint! It's easy to play and full of colorful farm fun.

title: Flower Sort
description:
Sort Flowers is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you sort flowers by type!
Combine three identical flowers in one pot to grow a lush, beautiful bush.
Plan your moves, create satisfying merge chains, and enjoy the colorful and cozy atmosphere.
Each level brings new combinations, vibrant colors, and delightful visual effects.

title: Impostor Among Space
description: Impostor Among Space is a thrilling single-player stealth game where you play as the Impostor aboard a spaceship full of unsuspecting AI crewmates. Your mission? Eliminate them one by one, sabotage critical systems, and avoid detection at all costs.

title: Animal Basketball
description: Dive into Basketball: The Power of Moe! Team up with adorable animals, unlock over 100 magical balls, and enjoy physics-powered hoop action. Play through arcade, championship, and mission modes on dazzling courts in this fun and addictive basketball party!

title: Merge Fusion
description: Merge Fusion is an entertaining and addictive casual game where you combine and evolve items to create superior versions. The goal is to drag and merge identical items, triggering new fusions and unlocking more challenging levels as you progress. The game features simple, relaxing gameplay that is perfect for unwinding. Experience the satisfaction of watching your creations grow progressively in complexity as you explore new possibilities with each merge.

title: Tic Tac Toe Merge
description:
Tic-Tac-Toe Merge is a revolutionary twist on the classic game! Unlike traditional tic-tac-toe, pieces have power levels from 1 to 3. Place higher-level pieces to capture your opponent's weaker ones!

MERGE TO DOMINATE
Combine two level-1 pieces to create level-2, and two level-2 to forge powerful level-3. Create chain reactions when 3+ same-level pieces align — they merge into an even stronger piece!

title: Space Survival Rainbow Friends Monster
description: Begin a fun battle like never before in Space Survival - Rainbow Friends Monster! You’re in a mysterious space station overrun by terrifying rainbow monsters. Your task is to escape and rescue your friends. Use your gun to begin the battle. Avoid enemy attacks and unleash shooting combos against waves of enemies.

title: Animal Merge Zoo Park
description:
Animal Merge Zoo Park is a fun and addictive idle zoo simulation game where you build, manage, and expand your very own wildlife empire. Start with a small zoo and grow it into a world filled with animals, wild beasts, dinosaurs, monsters, and magical creatures like unicorns. Become the ultimate zoo tycoon by merging creatures, caring for animals, producing food, managing visitors, and unlocking new zones.
Merge Animals and Discover New Species

title: Merge Blocks 2048
description: Swipe to slide numbered tiles on a 4x4 grid. Match two identical blocks to merge them into a bigger number. Start from 2 and work your way up to 2048 and beyond. The board fills up with every move so plan ahead. Chain multiple merges in a row to build combos and earn bonus coins. Spend coins in the shop on power-ups like Undo, Extra Life, Score Boost, Shuffle and Head Start. Beat your high score and try to reach the highest tile possible. Easy to learn, hard to master.

title: Theo Morini's Magical Resort
description:
“Theo Morini’s Magical Resort” is a magical, romantic, and captivating merge puzzle game about rebuilding a resort on an enchanted island.

Talented writers and actors created this story and brought its characters to life. Enjoy the story!

title: VegaMix Da Vinci Puzzles
description: "VegaMix Da Vinci Puzzles" is a match-3 adventure with quests and an interactive story. After a time-machine failure, Alice, Vika, and Lesha end up in Renaissance Italy and meet Leonardo da Vinci. To return home, they must help him finish his inventions, recover lost blueprints, and uncover secrets hidden in his workshop while exploring the art-filled cities and palaces of 15th-century Italy.

title: Pixel Blast
description: Pixel Blast is a colorful online arcade game that mixes classic gameplay with modern design. Play for free on your phone or computer and enjoy smooth controls and vibrant pixel art. It’s easy to pick up and fun for players of all ages.

title: Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up
description:
In Idol Livestream: Doll Dress Up, you’re dressing up your doll and getting her ready to go live. Pick from different styles—she can look like a fairy, wear chill street clothes, or go for a beach outfit. When you’re done, she jumps on the stream and starts showing off her look.

You can mess with her hair, add makeup, and try out accessories. There’s also a battle mode where you go up against other players to see who styled it best.

title: Animal Royal
description:
"The ultimate player versus player game allows players to engage in battles against their opponents using unique animals."
You'll be challenged to use your wits and strategy to outsmart your opponents and emerge victorious.
Animal Royal is a game that features a wide variety of animals and birds, each with its unique strengths and weaknesses.
Your goal is to protect your meat from being eaten by your opponent's animals while sending your animals to eat as much meat as possible to win the battle.

title: Obby Prison Run
description: Obby Prison Run is an intense obstacle course game where escape is the only option—and survival is everything. Sprint, leap, and dodge through deadly traps and twisted takes on classic childhood games. Outsmart your rivals and stay ahead in the race for freedom, where every second counts and only the sharpest make it out alive.

title: Toka Boka Home Clean Up Design
description: A new family has just arrived in this town, and they're in desperate need of your assistance. This isn't just a helping hand mission; it's a home transformation and management simulator! You need to help them clean dust, clean the home, rearrange clothes, design the house, and repair damaged things.

title: Slime Farm!
description: Farm Slime: Slime Farm Simulator is a relaxing yet addictive game where you drive a suction truck to vacuum up unruly slimes and turn them into cash. Cruise smoothly through gooey fields, slurp with satisfying precision, sell your haul to upgrade your truck and expand your farm into a thriving slime empire.

title: Robberies 3D
description:
Welcome to Robberies 3D, a fast-paced online shooter where you can don the mask of a real robber! Inspired by the legendary PAYDAY series, this game offers exciting gameplay: search for keys, break into vaults, use a drill, and steal whatever you can get your hands on.
Choose your style: engage in a loud battle with the police or operate stealthily like a shadow. But don't think it will be easy: each level is a test of your agility, strategy, and nerves.

title: Word Game 2026
description: Immerse yourself in "Word Puzzle," a premium brain-teasing game featuring a stunning 3D animated background! Test your vocabulary and fast-thinking skills by guessing the missing letters before the thrilling 30-second timer runs out. With 100 exciting levels, neon-glassmorphism graphics, and highly addictive gameplay, this game will keep you hooked for hours. Can you become the ultimate Word Master?

title: Geometry Wave Hero
description: Geometry Wave Hero is an exciting rhythm-based game that takes players on a thrilling journey through a vibrant color world. This game offers a unique twist on the classic Geometry Dash formula, focusing exclusively on the wave game mode. Players must navigate their wave through a series of challenging obstacles, using simple one-touch mechanics to control its movement.

title: 99 Balls
description: 99 Balls 3D is an endless arcade game that mixes brick breaker and bubble shooter action in full 3D. Launch balls to smash numbered cylinders before they reach the bottom. Collect stars to unlock fun ball skins like sports balls, gems, or fruit. Simple to play, endlessly challenging, and highly addictive!

title: Puzzle Games: Outing Day
description: Welcome to Puzzle Game: Outing Day, a casual puzzle game online. Today is the day for an outing. What will happen with all the little animals? What activities will they have on their trip to the field? Come and explore the interesting things on the camp and solve puzzles with your animal partners. See if you are the cleverest child in the crowd!

title: Arrow Escape
description: Get ready for a fast-paced and strategic arrow challenge in Arrow Escape, an addictive arrows puzzle escape game built for players who love logic puzzles and intense puzzle escape moments.

title: Room Sort Floor Plan
description: Room Sort Floor Plan is a fun creative puzzle game with elements of sorting and design. In this casual game, you’ll go through proper sorting and organization. Designing the perfect layout for every room. Rearrange the floor plan to create your unique home. Each level is a jigsaw puzzle challenge.

title: Real Impossible Sky Tracks Car Driving
description: Real Impossible Sky Tracks Car Driving  simulator, stunts, and gameplay options keep it interesting. This game is great for racing, 3D car games, and extreme car driving fans. Multiplayer and internet games let you challenge friends and show off your track talents. ??️

title: Cyber Monday
description: Cyberpunk Monday thrusts you into a neon-drenched arcade cyberpunk adventure. Hack terminals, dodge digital foes, and race across futuristic CityGrid zones. Look for combos, outsmart AI, and collect cyber credits in this fast-paced hacking runner. Perfect for fans of cyberpunk games, arcade game thrills, free mobile games, and even cool math games that students love. Gear up—your Monday just got cyber.

title: Hypermarket 3D: Store Cashier
description:
Step into the world of retail and build the supermarket of your dreams! 

Manage customers, run the cash register, stock shelves, and keep your store thriving. From scanning groceries to cart-surfing adventures, every task brings your bustling market to life.

Take charge as the supermarket cashier, master time management, and turn your small store into a thriving grocery empire.

title: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator
description: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator is a 3D strategy battle game where planning is the key to victory. Build your army of Swordsmen, Spearmen, and Archers, analyze enemy formations, and lead your ninja forces to triumph across challenging levels.

title: Obby Pinata Party
description: Help the Obby guy to fight those pinatas and Explore the world. Choose from wide variety of weapons, collect coins and upgrade them. Make the pinatas give you every penny they have!

title: Lava Jump
description: Lava Jump is a fast-paced parkour platformer set in a deadly lava-filled dungeon! Jump across moving blocks, bounce off boost pads, and ride shifting platforms to survive. Complete more than 25 levels, evade enemies, spikes and other deadly objects and escape from the lava dungeon alive. Collect coins and get new characters to use in your adventure.

title: Archery Legends
description: This is a game with many levels and two modes Classic and Adventure. Test your archery prowess in this level based game. Aim and shoot the bull's eye to score the most. This is a fun casual game.

title: Math Crossword Puzzle - Genius Edition
description: Challenge your brain with Math Crossword, the perfect mix of logic puzzles and number games! Solve clever math equations in a crossword-style grid by placing the correct numbers into the right spots. Each level sharpens your brain with fun and rewarding challenges that test your addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division skills.

title: Spider Solitaire
description: Get ready to dive into the timeless classic Spider Solitaire, reimagined for mobile with sleek design and intuitive gameplay! Perfect for players of all skill levels, this game offers a relaxing yet challenging card puzzle experience anytime, anywhere.

title: Auto Ninja
description:
Auto Ninja is the ultimate ninja platform game that dares you to conquer 41 trap-filled chambers with sharp reflexes and puzzle-solving skills. 

Your mission? Steal all three coins hidden in each chamber to unlock exclusive ninja skins and show off your mastery.

With simple but tight controls, dynamic level design, and a steady ramp in difficulty, Auto Ninja delivers an intense, addictive experience that tests your agility, timing, and wit. Play now and rise to the challenge!

title: Stick Master Teleport
description:
Jump onto walls, throw knives, and teleport to your enemies ⚔️ to defeat them with a single strike.
Prove your ninja reputation by eliminating bad guys before they even notice.
Walk the tough path of a ninja to become a true ninja assassin!

title: Prásino
description: Prasino is a free-to-play forest adventure game that combines exploration, survival, and environmental restoration. As nature’s last hope, your mission is to travel through beautiful landscapes, collect magical seeds, and revive the forest by planting trees. Along the way, you must watch out for dangerous enemies and manage your breath carefully to keep exploring deeper into the wild.

title: Screw Masters 3D Puzzle
description:
Collect screws, take apart complex objects piece by piece, and test your puzzle-solving skills! Work your way through exciting levels, dismantle items down to the tiniest parts, and earn amazing rewards along the way. Use powerful bonuses to advance faster, beat challenging stages, and reach new heights.
Play, win, and share your best results with friends!

title: My Tiny Market
description: In My Tiny Market, you're the boss of your very own supermarket. Manage your time and resources well to find the perfect balance between all your tasks: restock shelves, serve customers and keep everything running at full speed!

title: Burger Tycoon
description: Start your journey as the owner of a small burger joint and work your way up to building a massive fast food empire! Take full control of every aspect of the business—from grilling delicious burgers and serving customers to managing staff and expanding your restaurant chain. Upgrade your kitchen, optimize your workflow, and attract more customers to grow your brand. Can you turn your humble burger stand into the ultimate fast food empire?

title: Fruit Block Tetra Puzzle
description: Fruit Block Tetra Puzzle is a fast and fun block puzzle game where you place fruit-shaped blocks to clear lines and collect target fruits before time runs out. Complete each fruit goal to level up and unlock new challenges. Easy to play, satisfying to master, and perfect for quick, brain-boosting fun!

title: Bubble Trouble
description:
Avoid and pop the bubbles! Shoot the bubbles with your harpoon and split them in smaller bubbles, until eventually they disappear.
The classic arcade game from 2002, remastered.
Bubble Trouble (later Bubble Struggle) has been played hundreds of millions of times, labeled 'one of the top 10 online games'.

22 unique levels, for 1 or 2 players (on the same keyboard).
Final boss level.
Challenge other player's scores.

title: Nautilus Spaceship Escape
description: There is an eerie silence on the Nautilus, an intergalactic spaceship. You have just been asleep when the power goes out for a moment. An uneasy feeling creeps over you - something is wrong here. Could there have been an attack? Get up, explore the surroundings and find out what has happened!

title: Pool Master
description: From a rookie with a cue to a legend of the table, journey through 100 challenging levels with closed pockets, special balls to clear and more. Unlock custom gear, gain special boosts and rule the table with precision and power.

title: Ocean Pop
description: Ocean Pop is a lively underwater puzzle game where real 2D bubbles float, bounce, and cluster with natural physics. Pop matching bubbles, trigger chain reactions, and enjoy dynamic, ever-shifting puzzles. Its colorful ocean setting, smooth mechanics, and playful movement create a relaxing yet engaging experience that’s easy to learn and satisfying to master.

title: Vex Hyper Dash
description:
Get ready for a fast-paced challenge in this brand-new Vex spin-off: Vex Hyper Dash! Inspired by the legendary Geometry Dash. Your goal is simple: survive as long as possible. Jump from platform to platform, time your moves perfectly, and avoid the countless dangers that stand in your way. One wrong move, one mistimed jump, and it’s game over. 

Vex Hyper Dash puts your reflexes and precision to the ultimate test. Can you master the flow and set a new high score?

title: Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles
description:
Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles is a relaxing jigsaw-style puzzle game where you assemble beautiful images piece by piece. Enjoy a calming experience as each picture comes to life under your fingertips!
Who It's For
Ideal for puzzle lovers, casual players, and anyone who enjoys peaceful, visually pleasing gameplay.
Start assembling now with Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles — discover a cozy world of delightful puzzles!

title: CS: Chaos Squad
description: CS: Chaos Squad is an exciting 5v5 team-based shooter that demands tactical thinking, teamwork, and quick reflexes. Engage in fast-paced battles where you can purchase weapons and gear each round, allowing you to adapt your strategy on the fly. The ranking system tracks player and team performance, encouraging continuous improvement and competition. Fight for victory, build team synergy, and prove that your squad is the best on the battlefield!

title: Fun IQ Puzzle
description: Fun IQ Puzzle is a vibrant and engaging logic game that test your problem-solving skills with colorful bubble-based puzzles. In Story Mode, we have to unlock locked spaces by placing colorful puzzles in the right spots. In Time Attack Mode, we have to race against the clock to solve puzzles as quick as possible. Challenge yourself to master every stage with this fun puzzle game!

title: Coffee Color Blocks
description: Coffee Color Blocks is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you move colored shapes around the board and guide them to gates of the matching color. Each correct connection fills the cups inside the shape — your goal is to fill the entire figure without blocking the path.

title: Number Master Run And Merge
description: Number Master: Run And Merge is an awesome number racing game that lets you run, merge, and upgrade on a parkour platform to become a true number master! Control your number character as you run through dynamic tracks. Keep collecting more numbers and expanding. Merge with matching numbers to grow stronger. The bigger your number, the more unstoppable you become! Pick the smartest paths, hit speed zones, and keep your speed maxed out!

title: Smashdoll
description:
Smashdoll – Ragdoll Smash Game is a fast and chaotic physics game where you smash through floors, obstacles, and enemies to reach the bottom! Collect coins, dodge bullets, and upgrade your smash power, jump force, and trails.

Break enough floors to charge your smash meter and transform into an unstoppable bullet of destruction. How far can you smash?

title: Color Hoop Sort
description: Color Hoop Sort Puzzle Game is a fun and relaxing online puzzle where you sort colorful hoops onto rods. Test your logic and focus as levels get harder! Perfect for all ages, this brain-teasing game will keep you entertained for hours. Play now and see how far you can go!

title: Manyunya Saving the Princess
description: Welcome to the time when there were knights, magic, farmers, princesses, and generals. Manyunya sets off at the request of the Supreme Lord to save his princess. On the way you will find a whole dangerous adventure, you will come across colorful views, and characters with whom you can communicate and interact, as well as enemies that you will need to defeat at any cost, and save the princess, and complete the task. Interesting voice acting and story will immerse you in this world with your head!

title: Pull the Pin: Fish Rescue!
description: Pull the Pin: Fish Rescue! is a relaxing and addictive puzzle game with lots of interesting puzzles. You will see several niches in it. They will be separated by partitions. In one niche you will see a fish, and in another water. You will need to carefully study everything and pull the pin. Thus, you will open it and water will get to the fish.

title: Happy Fluffy Cubes
description: Happy Fluffy Cubes is a bright and fun 3D runner with adorable cube heroes, tricky traps, and a collection system! Choose your Fluffy and fly through levels full of danger: fire, ice, lasers, and spinning saws! Simple one-touch control, but surviving takes focus and reflexes.

title: Paris Kiss
description: Welcome to Paris Kiss, a fun and quirky puzzle game where your goal is simple — bring the characters together for a kiss

title: Sort And Style: Back To School
description: Step into the world of Sort And Style: Back To School, a fun mix of sorting and dress-up games for girls! Organize messy desks, lockers, wardrobes, and even bento boxes across 9 exciting levels. Then, challenge your creativity in the final dress-up unit where you style your school look with trendy uniforms, shoes, hairstyles, and accessories. Perfect for fans of organizing games, makeover fun, and school fashion challenges!

title: Cool Orange Ball: Bounce Adventure
description:
Cool orange ball went on an adventure in which evil stones beat him, but the orange ball has 3 hearts. The game is similar to mario and sonic.

Game Features:
- Lots of exciting levels
- Various biomes
- Secrets in some levels
- Skins of colorful balls

Did you like the game Cool Orange Ball: Bounce Adventure? - Then try our other games and write a review on what to improve or what game we should release next!

title: Kawaii Claw Merge
description:
The cutest merging adventure has arrived, featuring some of the most colorful Kawaii plushies around! 

Show off your merging skills by combining smaller Kawaii plushies to get a bigger plushy! Can you discover the biggest plushy of them all?

Ready for a serious dose of cuteness?
Play Kawaii Merge now - and let the merging magic begin!

title: Noob vs Zombie Apocalypse: shooting pro
description:
Post-apocalypse! Noob finds himself alone against zombies. Passing levels, he accumulates coins and picks up weapons.
There is a grenade launcher, a pistol, an uzi, a shotgun, a machine gun, a laser pistol, a rifle, a laser rifle - and so on!

Noob vs Zombie Apocalypse: shooting pro is an epic noob game in the world, similar to minecraft fnaf. Noob shoots at zombies with a variety of weapons like a rambo. Noob miner starts his fighting fnaf survival!

There are 60 levels and 15 bosses in total!

title: Cool Girl Aesthetics
description: In Cool Girl Aesthetics, join Mia as she creates her ultimate trendy look! Start by customizing her Stanley cup with fun colors, prints, and accessories. Then, style her headphones, giving them a unique vibe. Next, design her manicure with cool colors, rings, and temporary tattoos for a stylish edge. Complete the look with makeup options like face stickers, colorful braces, and more. Dive into this fun, creative dress-up, and makeover game for endless aesthetic options.

title: Snow Road Puzzle
description: Play Snow Road Puzzle free online — an addictive browser puzzle game with no download, no install, and no login required. Slide icy tiles, create snowy roads, and solve fast-paced logic puzzle levels instantly. Perfect for fans of cool math games, unblocked games, and brain puzzle challenges at school or home. This free online puzzle game is mobile-friendly, fast-loading, and fully playable on desktop or phone. Enjoy endless winter logic puzzles and sharpen your brain anytime, anywhere.

title: Hidden Object Adventure
description: Are you ready to solve puzzles and uncover hidden secrets? Become a detective in Find Hidden Object Game and test your observation skills! Explore detailed scenes in schools, houses, amusement parks, and zoos. Search for cleverly hidden items, challenge your brain, and enjoy fun, relaxing gameplay. Perfect for casual players and puzzle lovers alike. Train your mind and become the ultimate detective!

title: Pyramid Jewels
description:
A fun and colorful puzzle game set in Ancient Egypt. Aim and shoot magical gems to match the same colors and make them disappear. 
Tests your aim and thinking as you clear the board and uncover the secrets of the pyramids.

title: Foam and Find
description: Foam and Find is a relaxing hidden object game with a playful bubble twist. Explore cozy houses, each filled with charming rooms and easy-to-spot hidden items. Your tasks appear inside floating bubbles — and when you find an item, it flies into its bubble and pops with a satisfying animation. No timers, no stress — just a calm, casual experience at your own pace.

title: My Purrfect Cat Hotel
description: Welcome to My Purrfect Cat Hotel, a super cute cat hotel simulation management game. Enjoy cute and vivid cartoon cat animations. This is the vacation spot for all meow stars, and your mission is to create the most cozy cat hotel. Serving a variety of adorable cats and catering to their needs. Make your hotel the most popular animal tycoon hotel.

title: Cookie monster
description: What more could you ask for?! Puzzle, brain teaser, monsters, snacks...wait what? That's right MONSTERS and SNACKS! Feed the hungry monsters snacks to pass the level! You have to make sure all the snacks get into the monster's mouth though or you will see a sad face! Let's keep these monsters happy! If you like the game, leave us a review! That will help us continue to bring you many more challenging levels, new monsters, maybe some new twizzler lines.

title: Lion Family Sim Online
description: Step into the wild and rule the savannah in Lion Family Sim Online. It’s a full animal simulation adventure where you live the life of a mighty lion. Build and grow your own lion family, explore vast open landscapes, and face thrilling challenges. Hunt for food to survive, protect your territory, and lead your pride with strength and strategy.

title: BMG: CrashDay 2025
description: The game "BMG: CrashDay 2025" is an arcade racing simulator that combines elements of action and realism. Players can choose from a variety of cars, each with its own unique characteristics and appearance. The game has various tracks, each with its own features, such as difficult turns, steep climbs and descents, as well as various obstacles.

title: Cunning Ginger
description: Cunning Ginger is a super fun game that'll give you lots of excitement and intense emotions! The game follows the adventures of a cute red cat, Ginger, as he goes on a great journey around the world. He's catching falling food items and dodging all sorts of dangerous things along the way. Your goal in the game is to help Ginger explore the world and pick up as many goodies as possible. But beware - there are tons of dangerous obstacles that could harm your furry friend.

title: Airport Security
description: Airport Security is a casual simulation game that immerses you in the high-stakes world of airport safety, placing you in the role of a vigilant security officer dedicated to safeguarding a bustling terminal. Your mission is to maintain a secure environment by identifying suspicious passengers, spotting fake passports, and uncovering hidden contraband using cutting-edge X-ray machines.

title: Bubble Shooter Ultimate
description: Bubble shooter ultimate is a classic bubble shooter game with a modern twist. Each level-up you get to chose a power up like a change to get a bomb or rainbow bubble and more. Create combinations of three or more matching bubbles by launching bubbles of the same color at them. The more bubbles you pop in a single shot, the higher your score. If you miss a match 5 times, the playing field moves down by one row. The objective is to score as many points as possible while clearing all the bubbles!

title: Toilet Time
description: Toilet Time is more than just a puzzle game—it’s a hilarious journey into the quirkiest parts of everyday life. Challenge yourself with toilet-inspired puzzles that combine creativity, wit, and humor.

title: Sprunki Easter Coloring
description: Sprunki Easter Coloring is an exciting and colorful online game designed especially for kids who love to explore their imagination. This delightful digital coloring book lets young artists express themselves through a fun and festive Easter theme. With charming Sprunki characters and spring-inspired backgrounds, children can dive into a world of creativity that is both relaxing and full of color. And the best part—it is completely free to play online.

title: Clash & Run
description: One chance, no turning back. Speed is your only ally in a world that won’t wait. Race through ever-shifting terrain where every jump could be your last. Collect coins and unlock unique looks. Precision and quick thinking will keep you in the game longer.

title: Graduation Makeup Trends
description: Discover the latest makeup trends with our Graduation Makeup Trends game! From bold and fierce to soft and elegant, this game offers a variety of makeup options to suit your style. We bring 3 BFFs, each with a unique style, many makeup options, stunning dresses, and accessories for your inspiration. Mixed with floral printed dresses, golden jewelry, and holographic accessories, in the Graduation Makeup Trends game, you will find everything you need to help these girls make a statement.

title: Monster Slayers
description: Monster Slayers is a single‑player mobile roguelike RPG where you must survive endless waves of monsters all by yourself. Every run is a new chance to build the perfect hero, outplay growing hordes, and prove that one warrior can stand against an entire army.

title: Merge 2048 Cake
description:
Merge 2048 Cake is a colorful and relaxing puzzle game where you merge matching tiles to create higher numbers!
Combine three or more identical tiles to form a new one with double the value. Plan your moves, trigger satisfying chain reactions, and aim for the ultimate 2048 tile!
Enjoy smooth gameplay, vivid visuals, and a cozy, casual vibe that’s easy to play and hard to put down.

title: BOMBAMAN 3D
description: Blast your way through a thrilling 3D adventure! Use bombs to destroy obstacles, defeat monsters, and uncover power-ups. Find the hidden gate before time runs out, battle bosses, and unlock upgrades. Play solo or with a friend for nonstop action-packed fun!

title: Guess The Drawing
description: This is a casual puzzle game where you draw and I guess. Maybe you've played a game like that before, where someone draws on your back and you draw on the front, and then you see if you agree. If you like that kind of game, then this game is for you. In this game, you need to memorize what the person behind you draws.You can use the coins you get to buy the brushes you need. Come and experience this new and interesting game world.

title: Winter Mahjong
description: You can test your pattern detection skills in this relaxed mahjong & connect puzzle game with winter christmas theme. You can eliminate pair of same tiles. The line connecting the two clicked tiles can't have more than 2 corners. Some levels the tiles can auto slide( to left, to right, to up, to bottom). Can you clear the board before time runs out? Enjoying matching winter tiles with 32 levels in this game.

title: Gold Miner Tower Defense
description: Gold Miner Tower Defense is a wonderful combination of tower defense, card strategy and upgrade combat. You will play as a brave miner protecting gold from enemies. Protect your precious treasures strategically with many unique defense towers!

title: Syder Hyper Drive
description: Syder Hyper Drive is stunt car game, based on futuristic theme. Perform different stunts from varieties of available vehicles, complete missions in this endless game.

title: Hero Rabbit Idle Survivor RPG
description: We are rabbits! A fun offline survival shooting RPG game starring a rabbit!Hero Rabbit is an offline game. Players can play games anytime, anywhere without connecting to WiFi and the Internet.

title: Sokoban Push The Box
description: Challenge your brain in Sokoban - Push The Box. This is a timeless classic puzzle game. Enter a clever maze full of crates, tight corners, and tricky layouts. Your task is simple but challenging. Push every box to the correct spot. Each level will test your logic, patience, and planning skills. One wrong move could block your path, so think carefully before every push. But keep an eye on your move count.

title: Unscrew Wood Puzzle
description: Unscrew Wood Puzzle: Screw Jam is an engaging puzzle game that combines logic, strategy, and dexterity in a tactile experience. Players are challenged to solve intricate puzzles involving bolts, nuts, and screws. With hundreds of unique levels, this game provides a blend of relaxation and mental stimulation, perfect for casual gamers and puzzle enthusiasts alike. The beautifully designed wooden and metallic elements create a visually appealing and satisfying gameplay experience.

title: Travel Story Match
description: Embark on a global adventure with Travel Story Match! Match 3 identical travel items to complete exciting puzzles. Use powerful boosters to tackle tricky combinations, explore iconic destinations, and uncover hidden gems. Complete Daily Missions and Weekly Challenges, collect rewards, and enjoy hundreds of thrilling levels. Start your journey now and create your very own unforgettable travel story!

title: Submarine Attack
description: Command a submarine, destroy enemy ships with torpedoes, unlock new weapons, and conquer the ocean. Engage in thrilling naval battles, use unique abilities, face numerous enemies, and wield powerful armaments to achieve victory.

title: Spider-Noob obstacle course
description:
Noob was bitten by a creeper-spider and became a spider-noob! Help Noob train in the big city, fly on webs, collect badges, unlock new costumes, and complete challenges. Unlock new levels. 

Complete all the levels and turn Noob into a Pro-spider

title: Mona Lisa Fashion Experiments
description: Welcome to a small humorous adventure in which you will try on the role of a stylist for the most mysterious lady of all time - Mona Lisa Gioconda. Connect the past and the present by mocking trends and memes. Each of your changes is a small work of art, and each outfit immediately causes fireworks of pleasant emotions. There is no framework here - only freedom of expression. And the variety of images is guaranteed to make your time in the game unforgettable!

title: Huggy Mix Sprunki Music Box
description: Welcome to the wonderful world of Huggy Mix Sprunki Music Box. This music game is filled with energy and rhythm. Follow the beats, tap along to the music, and have fun with casual gameplay.You can choose three modes: health, ice, and bad man. You can make unique tunes that reflect your personality.

title: Dalgona Master
description:
Welcome to Dalgona Master, a thrilling game for those who loves dalgona, honeycomb, cookie game, and dalgona challenges.

This engaging sweet game challenge invites you to carve delicate shapes out of honeycomb candy, immersing you in the delicate skill required to perfect each piece without breaking it.

title: Luna And The Magic Maze
description: Have you ever wished to master magic without any innate abilities? In this game, you'll lead Luna, a curious little creature with big dreams of becoming a wizard, through intricate and ever-challenging mazes. Set in an enchanting autumn forest, your goal is to gather magical artifacts, unlock gates, and navigate through teleportation portals to complete each level. The challenges will intensify, but so will the thrill. Can you help Luna prove that perseverance surpasses magic?

title: iTileZen sort puzzle
description: iTileZen Sort Puzzle  is a fresh and addictive puzzle game that blends the strategic color sorting mechanics with the satisfying tile-matching gameplay. Moves  colorful tiles to complete objectives before time runs out! Whether you love logic puzzles or fast-paced matching challenges, this game offers the best of both worlds.

title: Vex X3M 2
description:
Building on the classic Vex experience, VEX X3M2 introduces intense levels packed with new hazards and mechanics. New features like kite gliding let you soar over gaps, while teleportation portals help you navigate tricky sections. Floating platforms and shifting obstacles keep you on your toes, making every race an unpredictable thrill ride.
Earn stars to unlock high-performance bike skins and conquer each track in easy and hard mode to prove yourself as the ultimate Vex champion!

title: Minicraft Winterblock
description: Winter has arrived, and everything is covered in snow. In the snow-covered forest, you must be very careful to survive. You need to find two chests and collect all the snowballs. But be cautious, there are monsters everywhere waiting to eat you. You must defeat the monsters and reach the hidden portal at the end of the level. You must leave the house safely and pass through the portal.

title: Mojicon Love Connect
description: 2Million Games presents Mojicon Love Connect: the biggest Mojicon game to date! Match sweets, beat challenging levels and discover sweet moments in the animal kingdom!

title: Robot Terminator T Rex
description: Ready for an adventure in Robot Terminator T-Rex! Enter the wonderful world where robot dinosaurs and zombies collide in a nervous battle. You'll control a terrifying robotic T-Rex, equipped with powerful weapons and amazing abilities.

title: Candy Match Puzzle
description:
Dive into a delightful puzzle experience with Candy Puzzle Match, where matching candies is all about tapping! Simply tap on groups of two or more adjacent candies of the same color to clear them from the board. The more candies you clear at once, the higher your score!

Watch the board shift and cascade with every move as you complete deliciously fun objectives. With colorful visuals and satisfying chain reactions, this game is perfect for fans of casual and relaxing puzzle games.

title: Snow Race 3d Fun Racing
description: Snow Race 3D: Fun Racing is an addictive arcade game. Do you want to participate in a snow race? This is probably the most fascinating and addictive game you have ever played! Collect the snow around you to make huge snowballs, then let them build ladders and climb to higher levels. Your opponents will have the same talent and you will have to race against time to race against them! Be the first to reach the finish line to win! Come join us and become a snowball master!

title: Just Slap It!
description:
Just Slap It is a fun and lighthearted slap-based game where timing and accuracy are key. Compete in slap battles, perfect your timing, and climb the leaderboard to showcase your skills.

With simple controls and engaging gameplay, challenge yourself to out-slap opponents and rise to the top. Unlock upgrades and enjoy quick, casual fun anytime.

title: Cut In Half
description:
Cut obstacles in the way with knives or characters.
If you touch a red block or fall into a valley, it's a game over.
Collect the goods as much as you cut the obstacles to unlock new characters!

title: Solitaire L'Amour
description: Love is in the air. And so is Solitaire! Enter an enchanting world as you fall head over heels for this charming new Solitaire adventure!

title: Save the cats - Bubble shooter
description:
Think strategically, aim, shoot and get rid of all the bubbles.

Explore hundreds of levels with different levels of difficulty.

Be as accurate as possible to free all the cats.

Buy and use boosters on challenging levels.

To win - clear the field of all the balloons.

title: Barry Prison Christmas Adventure
description: Want the craziest Christmas escape adventure ever? Barry Prison Christmas Adventure is an exciting role-playing simulator. Enter chase mode or evade mode. Here, you will play the role of either the hider or the seeker. Select your preferred scenario to begin the challenge. Find a hidden spot to start hiding and evade your pursuers.

title: One HERO
description:
One Hero: Dive into the ultimate action-packed shooting game! Play as a lone hero, dodging and shooting your way through waves of enemies. Eliminate all foes to claim victory. Are you ready to be the last one standing?
Dive into a thrilling, action-packed adventure where you’ll face waves of enemies and intense boss battles.
With intuitive controls and accessible gameplay, players of all skill levels can jump in and start unleashing chaos in no time.

title: Uphill Rush 13
description: Introducing the new, thirteenth game in the Uphill Rush series, and this time in a new setting - a Water Park! Dive into (pun intended) the atmosphere of water fun, riding different types of tubes, surfboards and even jet skis! Unlock new power-ups and skins by overcoming obstacles, such as loops and long jumps. But don't be scared of them, they are your best friends when it comes to stunts, which give you bonuses! Not to mention, make you look insanely cool.

title: Funny Doctor Emergency
description: Do you want to be a doctor? In Funny Doctor Emergency, you treat patients in cute and funny emergencies. Patients come in many ages and situations. Every patient needs a different treatment. Choose the correct tool from the options to treat each problem. Follow simple steps to help patients recover and smile again. Watch them feel better after treatment. This game is playful and easy to enjoy.

title: Deadlock.io
description: Deadlock.io is an exciting game in the deadlock setting, where you capture territories and avoid enemies. Compete for the territory in thrilling battles! Become the leader of the arena like in paper.io!

title: Sniper Wars: Find the Criminal
description: The snipers have begun the battle! Find the villain among the crowd of citizens and eliminate him. Take a rifle and go on a dangerous mission to find the criminal! You have a photo of the criminal and a rifle, find him and eliminate him!

title: Urus City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning sports SUV through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Toy Match 3
description: Toy Match 3 is the third sequel to one of our cutest Match 3 puzzle games! Get ready for colorful graphics, fun animations, and a catchy soundtrack. Match adorable toys in over 4,100+ exciting levels and take on Daily Missions and Weekly Challenges! Embark on thrilling quests like the Treasure Hunt for amazing rewards. With tons of extras and surprises, Toy Match 3 is pure puzzle fun. Start playing now for free!

title: Bubble Shooter Candy Wheel Level Pack
description: Bubble Shooter Candy Wheel Level Pack is a fun and challenging game where you shoot candy bubbles to match three or more on a rotating wheel. Use power-ups like the Bomb to blast nearby candies and the Stopwatch to freeze time for unlimited moves. Earn coins by clearing levels and use them to unlock more exciting levels. With increasing difficulty and sweet rewards, this game promises endless fun. Spin, aim, and conquer the candy wheel!

title: Pictures Riddle
description:
Guess 1 word based on shown 4 pictures
Discover what word can be related to pictures
Game has 2 modes: “Pictures” & “Riddles”
 
Features:
-     Simple & addictive gameplay
-     Challenging riddles
-     Hundreds of fun levels
-     …



** Credits:
-     Music by “Fred Patry”
-     Menu vector created by upklyak – www.freepik.com

title: Merge Flowers
description:
Merge Flowers is a relaxing and addictive puzzle game! Grow your vibrant garden, discover unique flowers, and earn coins. Enjoy merge puzzle and match-3 mechanics as you combine flowers to create a blooming paradise.
With simple controls and cozy visuals, place flowers strategically to make space for new plants. Perfect for puzzle lovers and fans of casual idle games, Merge Flowers offers endless fun and a soothing experience. Start your floral journey today!

title: Zombie Terminator
description: Zombie Terminator is an exciting first-person shooter game where players take on the role of a survivor in a world overrun by a zombie outbreak. Players must survive and hunt zombies in this post-apocalyptic setting. The game attracts numerous players with its intense combat experience and rich weapon system.

title: Unicycle Balance 3D
description:
Balance, Pedal & Survive.

Enter the wacky and challenging world of Unicycle Balance 3D, a physics-based balancing game that tests your skill, patience, and reflexes! Guide your unicyclist across surreal landscapes, avoiding obstacles and mastering the delicate art of staying upright.

title: Bubble Tea
description: Bubble Tea – Color Game is all about mixing and matching and blending and fusing a huge assortment of flavors and colors to create cold drink concoctions that will have you licking your lips. Receive orders, choose the right ingredients, pour them all into a cup, and serve to your thirsty customers. Take care not to spill your drinks in the excitement!

title: Port Shipping Tycoon
description: Embark on a thrilling adventure as you build your own shipping empire in this addictive tile-flipping game! With just one click, start constructing your port business by flipping tiles to supply resources to bustling ports around the world.

title: Block Digger
description: Dig, Click, and Get Rich! In Block Digger, every tap brings you closer to fortune! Smash stones, collect coins and crystals, and upgrade your mine to skyrocket your earnings. Unlock new mines, chase achievements, and build your mining empire. It's easy, fun, and totally addictive—start digging today! ⛏️

title: Ultimate Destruction Simulator
description: Unleash your destructive side in this ultimate demolition experience! Enjoy realistic tower destruction with dynamic physics, and take control of time—slow it down, speed it up, or freeze the action. Experiment with gravity modes, from low to high or even zero gravity, and customize every detail, including debris levels, destructibility, and atmospheric dust. Built for fans of destruction, this game offers the smash-and-crash fun you've been craving!

title: Scary Teacher 3D Returns
description:
Start with the size of a board. A faint sound echoes through the hallway. You freeze, the heart is beating, and the house seems to breathe with you. You are inside the mansion of the old teacher once again.

In the 3D fear teacher, every shadow, every echo matters. Your goal is not to escape; it is mischief. But make an error, and you will become its next goal.

title: Otu
description:
In OTU, you control a nimble triangle bound to a circular orbit. Your mission is simple: stay alive as long as possible. But the universe is against you! Spheres close in from the void, shrinking bars attempt to crush you, and lethal rotating lasers force you to keep moving.

Think you’ve mastered the rhythm? Every 10 seconds, the game throws a Random Debuff at you. From screen-shaking earthquakes and inverted controls to pixelated vision and orbit shifts—no two runs are ever the same!

title: Zumba Quest
description: Explore a vibrant world with never-ending puzzles and diverse environments in each chapter. Push your limits with exciting timed challenges with special types of marbles to help you along the way. Unlock new marble shooters as you advance through exciting levels.

title: Survival On Raft Multiplayer
description: Begin an exciting survival adventure in Survival On Raft: Multiplayer. Have an addictive survival-adventure simulation on an island. Here, you'll be gathering various foods, stones, and other items. Collect ocean resources like wood, leaves and rare items. Sharks in the sea will attack your raft at any moment.

title: Stickman vs Zombies: Epic Fight
description:
The zombie apocalypse has begun today!

Stickman vs Zombies: Epic Fight is an epic stick fighting game with cool effects and combos in the platformer genre.

The most epic battles and fights await you in a cube world similar to minecraft, where the red stick fights against zombies, skeleton archers, withers and even Noob!

The game is similar to Stick War, Stickman vs Zombies and Stickman Warriors. Hordes of zombies attacked the red stick and his friends!

title: Sokoban P/R
description: Help the adorable loader handle his daily tasks in the classic Sokoban puzzle! Enjoy simple design, clever challenges, and the ability to develop your own strategy. Levels will gradually expand, so you can always test your skills. The best puzzle solutions await you!

title: High Heels Collect Run
description: Ready to begin a stylish running adventure in High Heels Collect Run! In this casual game, you’ll run through various fun environments. Stepping on heels can make you feel like a queen! Everyone loves to look perfect, and these heels will make you shine like a star!

title: Find the Sprunki
description: Find out the hidden Sprunki in the specified images. Each level has 12 hidden Sprunki. There are 12 levels in total. The time is limited so be fast and find all hidden objects before time runs out. Clicking in the wrong place several times reduces the time by an additional 5 seconds. So, if you are ready, start the game and have fun!

title: Zombie Shooting King
description: The apocalypse is here! Hordes of zombies are swarming the streets. You are the last line of defense. Grab your gun, sharpen your shooting skills, and unleash unstoppable firepower to survive. Shoot fuel tanks, airdrops, and more to get more firepower to destroy tons of zombies. Get diamonds to upgrade your talents like Guardrail, ATK Boost, Crit Rate, or Coin earning!

title: Block Puzzle - Frozen Jewel
description: An addictive block puzzle game that helps train your eyes and brain. It is a combination between the Tetris and Jewels game styles.

title: Bubble Shooter Blast
description: In the game you can become an experienced bubble shooter. You just need to choose a ball and shoot at the right place to burst the bubbles. You have to go through more than 200 levels, so play this exciting game and start popping bubbles. Collect and shoot 3 or more bubbles to experience a sweet victory! Blow up all the balloons with your quick thinking and tactics. The next level will be harder than the previous one. Are you ready to burst all the balloons in this game?

title: Monster Makeup 3D
description: Show off your makeup skills by helping monsters blend seamlessly into human society. Protect them by keeping their true identities hidden from angry mobs. Transform monsters to hide in plain sight, ensuring their survival. Customize their look by choosing skin color, changing eye lenses, adjusting their teeth, and adding the perfect wig to complete their human disguise. But be careful—make a mistake, and you might become the monster's next meal!

title: Number Tubes
description: Relax and train your brain with Number Tubes — the addictive number sorting and merging game! Tap to move balls, merge the same numbers into bigger ones, and keep going to beat your best score. No time limits, no pressure — just pure fun. Perfect for fans of merge games, number games, and classic sort puzzles.

title: Steal Brainrot Arena
description: Steal Brainrot Arena is a fast-paced collection and heist game where every match turns into a battle of wallets, wits, and sneaky steals. Play solo in 1 Player mode or team up and compete in 2 Player mode as you build the ultimate Brainrot lineup. With over 45+ brainrot characters to discover, your goal is simple: buy better Brainrots, earn more, and create the most stacked collection in the arena.

title: Russian Fishing at Sea
Cyberpunk: Corporation
description:
The corporation takes control of the city. You are the only one who can fight back and free the inhabitants.
Enlist the support of local residents by completing their tasks. Activate the robot and break through the defense line.

title: Texas Holdem Poker
description: Players compete for winning combinations of cards using their skills and intuition. The game has the ability to bet, bluff and recognize the bluff of other players. Players can choose different difficulty levels and customize their own game rules. The unique interface design and realistic atmosphere allow you to immerse yourself in the world of card games and enjoy the excitement anytime and anywhere.

title: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park
description: Fruitsland: Escape from the Amusement Park is a horror escape adventure where bright amusement park rides hide lurking dangers. Players must solve puzzles, collect items, and uncover clues while evading hostile enemies. Stealth and timing are crucial—explore cautiously, hide when needed, and outsmart the threats to survive and escape. The mix of colorful setting and eerie tension creates a unique, suspenseful experience.

title: Madness Cars Destroy
description:
The game features 6 unique modes:

Funnel: Push cars into the abyss as the funnel narrows!
Rotating Cube: Stay on the spinning cube, which speeds up over time!
Deadly Arena: Dodge falling bombs and collapsing floors—or shoot players instead!
Right Color: Inspired by Roblox, but with cars!
Deadly Bouncers: Avoid spinning mines in a gladiator-style arena!
Hot Potato: Pass the bomb or explode!
Choose from foreign or Russian cars and dive into the action!

title: Hidden Paint 3D
description: Coloring 3D is a relaxing and creative game where you bring the world to life with color. Tap objects to instantly paint them in bright, beautiful shades and watch scenes transform. Simple controls and calm gameplay make it perfect for all ages and stress-free fun.

title: Unicorn Princess Dress Up
description: Welcome to Unicorn Princess Dress Up, a casual girl dress-up game online. Dive into a fashion world where you design fashionable clothing, create trendy hairstyles, and produce perfect eye makeup. Unleash your creativity and talents in fashion design to make your princess doll charming and beautiful!

title: Angry Flappy
description: "Angry Flappy is a fast-paced twist on the classic game, where players not only navigate through obstacles but also shoot bullets to destroy enemies and barriers. Get ready for an action-packed flying adventure!"

title: Princesses of Quadrobics
description: Two beautiful princesses, Eliza and the Little Mermaid, are waiting for your help in creating the perfect images for practicing Quadrobics. First, create a gentle but expressive makeup for each of the girls and put your hair in a comfortable hairstyle. Then choose dresses, jewelry and accessories. But the adventures don't end there! Complete the look by putting masks in the form of adorable animals on the princesses. After all, this is a mandatory part of the Quadrobics trend!

title: Butterfly Sort Puzzle
description:
Various kinds of butterflies sitting on leaves.
Shy butterflies can only fly next to friends of the same kind.
Bring its friends to one leaf and fly them together~

title: Conduct This
description: Conduct This is a cartoon-style free puzzle online game played on PuzzleGame for boys. You need to move the obstacles on the track so that the train can pass successfully. Get coins for passing levels and unlock the beautiful skins of the train. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. I guess it's easy for you. Are you ready to try it now?

title: Merge Town!
description: Ever wanted to be Mayor? Ever wanted to run a town, develop the land, and see a metropolis grow? Well, look no further than Merge Town!, the newest title from Gram Games. The concept of the game is simple - you have a plot of land, and it’s your job to turn it into a town. Every so often, you’ll be gifted with a house. Each house can be merged with other houses of the same variety to form a bigger home.

title: Lunar Phase Battle

Before you join the battle, you can buy more guns and merge the same guns into new advanced ones. With more powerful and fast ammo in the clip, you can deal with incoming enemies more easily. Both zombies and crows will move forward to you even if you are still reloading. Keep calm and shoot the explosive oil cans on the ground if necessary.
