The game uses unique physics to operate, just pay attention to avoid obstacles, and unlock brand-new Domino on different levels. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Are you ready for the challenge?

title: THE KULKA
description:
THE KULKA is a one-button bullet-heaven arcade game where your single shot evolves into chaos. Inspired by Flappy Birds, Vampire Survivor and Pattern Survivors: Bullet Hell. 

MUTATE YOUR BULLET. FLAP, EVOLVE, SURVIVE.

title: My kitties. Catworld
description:
Create your own world with unusual kittens!
At the beginning of the game three kittens are waiting for you, with black, white and ginger colors. 
Create unprecedented colors, mix colors and get new ones: blue, pink, neon-green and others. All this is in our game!
Replenish your collection and perform tasks!

title: Hostage Fishes
description: A malfunction occurred in the aquarium filter pipes. The fish in the aquarium are in a very difficult situation. If you do not repair all the pipes within 1 minute, you may cause them to disappear.  You should fix the pipes as soon as possible to solve the problem.

title: Digital Aqua
description:
Digital Aqua is a digital aquarium designed for PC Browser.
Explore the vibrant world of aquariums, where colorful tropical fish and stunning underwater landscapes come to life.
Transform your Monitor into a serene and enchanting aquarium that fills your living room with comfort and wonder.

title: Stickman Football
description:
"Stickman Football" is an exciting 2D game where you take on the role of a stick football player and compete against an opponent. Your goal is to score using various moves and tricks.

You have the ability to teleport to the ball after a shot to improve your chances of scoring. This adds a strategic element to the game, as you must choose the right moment to use teleportation to get the ball into the goal.

title: Mushroom blocks
description: Meet colorful and diverse mushrooms! Collect mushroom blocks, earn points and win the rankings! On the way you will encounter all kinds of obstacles: lightning, bombs, frozen cells and others. Try to overcome all obstacles and hold out as long as possible, plunging into the cozy atmosphere of mushroom picking, accompanied by pleasant music!

title: Plant Girl Defense Zombie
description: Plant Girl Defense Zombie is a tower-defense shooting strategy game. With 2D cartoon plant girls and zombies, you need to defeat all of the zombies in 24 levels. Change the launching track and select skills when you level up. Different from the traditional Plants VS Zombies series, you don't need to build many plants to fight against zombies. You only need to control one plant to shoot. Good luck!

title: Murder Case Clue 3D
description: Murder Case Clue 3D is an exciting 3d escape game. You will play the role of detective, there was a murder recently, you need to find some clues and escape from this dangerous house. Be careful, good luck!

title: Magic Sorting
description: Magic Sorting is a simple and relaxing game for all ages. Place objects next to each other to collect 3 identical objects in a row.

title: Shine Seek
description: Dive into Gem Hunt Adventure, a fun treasure hunt puzzle game where you shine, seek, and solve! Explore glowing worlds, collect gems, and unlock hidden treasures while testing your brain with logic challenges. Perfect for US students searching “hidden object games,” “find the difference,” or “treasure hunt game.” With starry puzzles, bright visuals, and endless fun, this addictive casual game is the ultimate light-seeking adventure!

title: Gelatino
description:
Gelatino needs your help! He needs to collect as much ice as he can! 
The hot summer sun will melt him if he doesn't pay attention!
But the road isn't safe: it is full of evil hot suns that will melt Gelatino in no time!
Destroy them will make you earn more points, but the price to pay to make a highscore could be to high...

title: Hidden Objects: Vacation in Brazil
description:
Discover Hidden Treasures in Brazil – Play "Hidden Objects: Vacation in Brazil"!

Embark on a thrilling hidden object adventure through Brazil! Search and find hidden objects in stunning locations, enjoy fun mini-games, and collect unique souvenirs.

Explore famous landmarks like SugarLoaf Mountain and the Amazon jungle. Visit ancient castles, vibrant museums, and mysterious caves. Experience the energy of Rio de Janeiro and unwind on Brazil’s beautiful beaches.

title: Northern Lights - the secret of the forest
description:
A new hit for fans of the Match 3 game genre!

The Scientist Cat is already hiding items throughout the mysterious forest so you can enjoy finding things and earn as many emeralds as possible. The cat is happy to have new guests!

title: Race Clicker
description: Race Clicker is an action-packed idle clicker racing game that'll pump up your adrenaline. Customize, upgrade, and speed your way to victory. Each click pushes your limits, every upgrade unveils new possibilities, and each race dares you to click faster. Leave rivals in the dust and satisfy your need for speed with endless excitement. Start your engines and hit the track now!

title: Glossy Bubbles Challenge
description:
Dive into our bubble shooter! Burst bubbles, match colors, and rack up points in this addictive arcade game.

In the Glossy Bubbles Challenge, you'll encounter an incredibly colorful interface! The simple game mechanics combined with precise aiming create an atmosphere of complete control. Your task is to pop as many bubbles as possible with a single shot to achieve a high score. The ability to react quickly is crucial because the bubbles are relentlessly approaching!

title: Candy Monster Raffi
description: Help the candy monster Raffi eat all the candies! He absolutely loves them – all he wants is to eat candy. But be careful while collecting them! If you jump in the wrong direction, you might hit dangerous spikes. This cute little monster is hungry – run and feed Raffi with as many candies as you can!

title: Broken City Combat
description: Immerse yourself in the chaotic battleground of Broken City Combat, a fast-paced FPS set in a desolate urban warzone. As the city crumbles under relentless attacks, you are tasked with surviving the brutal onslaught while rescuing survivors and taking down ruthless enemies. Navigate through abandoned streets, derelict buildings, and multi-floor complexes, each filled with challenges and surprises.

title: Untwist Road
description: Collect cylinders, roll out the road and overcome obstacles in this unique game. It is suitable for all fans of arcade games who like to test their skills and reactions. Try all the features of the game, unlock new levels and beat your records! You only need a few minutes to fully immerse yourself in this exciting game. Try it yourself!

title: Castle Craft
description: Embark on a mystical journey in Castle Craft, where you merge resources and unlock the secrets of time. Start in a land cloaked in fog, using ancient keys to reveal hidden territories and trace your lost family's steps across eras.

title: Boss Market
description: You are the owner of your market. Customers are coming to buy various products. Collect these products and place them into correct stands so that customers can buy them. Collect money from customers and open new markets and become a market boss!

title: Pixel Fun Color By Number
description: Pixel Fun - Color By Number is a fun coloring game that lets you bring pixel art to life. With casual number-based instructions, you’ll fill in each pixel square to reveal stunning artwork.Each image is divided into tiny pixels. Each is assigned a number that corresponds to a color. For example, click on the city scene to fill in color and light up the street.

title: Mega Ramp Car
description:
Mega Ramp Car is a game with maximum speed and huge jumps! Are you ready to make the biggest leap in history?

Mega Ramp Car Features
- Realistic physics and sound effects.
- Real car collection
- This game allows you to perform amazing stunts on different jumps.
- Complete multiple levels and game modes for non-stop fun!
- You have to complete many challenging missions, which makes the game even more exciting.

Buy new cars to win new races.

title: Digging Moles
description: Dig, guide, and solve! In this physics-based puzzle game, tap or click to dig tunnels and create paths for cute, ball-shaped moles. Your mission is to help each mole roll into the correct colored pipe. Use gravity and smart digging to guide them through challenging terrain filled with obstacles, slopes, and surprises. Timing, precision, and a bit of creativity are key! With charming visuals and satisfying mechanics, this game offers fun and brain-teasing puzzles for players of all ages.

title: Red Stickman vs Monster School
description:
Red Stickman vs Monster School - stickman game where you need to pick up different weapons and clear levels from mobs from the school of monsters. The game contains

- 60 levels
- 10 bosses
- Many types of different weapons!

Did you like the game "Red Stickman vs Monster School "? - Then write a review and play all our games about stickmen.

title: Travel Mahjong Deluxe
description: Travel Mahjong Deluxe is a relaxing tile-matching puzzle where you match identical tiles and strategically clear the board. Find pairs of beautiful travel-themed tiles that are free on at least one side and remove them to complete each level. As you progress, new layouts and challenges will keep the game fresh and engaging. Use the Hint feature whenever you get stuck, or watch a reward video to gain unlimited time and continue your puzzle-solving adventure.

title: Woodoku Block Puzzle
description: Welcome to experience the Woodoku Block Puzzle! This is a super fun casual puzzle game, especially for relaxing in your free time. The gameplay is very simple and very challenging! There are four modes you can choose from.

title: Animal Swipe
description: Animal Swipe is a fun and addictive puzzle game where players match adorable animal pairs on a colorful board. With easy-to-learn controls and exciting power-ups, the game offers a challenge for both casual and strategic players. Use your wits and boosts to clear levels and achieve your objectives!

title: Word Guess Game
description: Are you good at guessing a word from provided letters in random order? Here is a word-guessing puzzle game with arcade play rules. There are four different modes with more letters from four to seven. More difficult modes have more time for you to use. Keep calm and make a new reword!

title: Fashion Famous
description: Step into the stylish universe of Fashion Famous! Compete in glamorous fashion contests, pick outfits that match each round’s theme, and impress the judges to earn high scores. Travel across global fashion capitals and showcase your look on dazzling runways. Explore makeup, hairstyles, and accessories to build the perfect outfit. Will your sense of style stand out among players from all around the world?

title: Falling Man
description:
Fall for fun in this addictive hypercasual game!
Ready for a wild ride? Join the thief as he falls from dizzying heights, dodging obstacles and collecting coins in this addictive hypercasual game. With two distinct locations to explore and endless possibilities for high scores, the fun never ends in this exciting game.

title: Off Road Overdrive
description: Off Road Overdrive plays like a side-scrolling car-balanced game with 2D cartoon vehicles. Let me introduce the game modes for you!If you want to make a perfect record, play Challenge mode with different terrains again and again including Snow, Beachwear, Field, Desert, and Dark Night. Even the 2D platform will test your driving skills and balance abilities!

title: Tralala Connect
description:
Tralala Connect – the ultimate Italian Brainrot meme puzzle!
Find and connect matching tiles featuring your favorite absurd meme characters.
Sharpen your focus and logic through 15 increasingly chaotic levels.
Unlock all 45 stars if your brain can handle the rot.
Mamma mia, it's peak concentration with a spicy twist!

title: Word Stars
description: Find hidden words and piece together your success. Each puzzle is a step towards mastering the game and expanding your word power. Use hints to keep progressing. From the first word to the last, it’s a race to finish all the levels.

title: TicToc Urban Outfits
description: Your favorite influencers are back, and this time, they are getting ready to have fun and dress up in urban fashion!  We've gathered four of our most fashionable BFFs to show you all their hottest looks, so join us in getting started with the TicToc Urban Fashion dress up game for girls, and have a blast choosing their outfit of the day. Experiment with different styles, play with colors and don't forget to use cool accessories for stunning urban looks.

title: Make It Boom!
description: Explosive puzzle adventure that challenges your strategy and timing skills! Your mission is simple: burst firecrackers to create thrilling chain reactions and clear each level. But beware—this isn’t just any ordinary puzzle game!

title: Minitoss
description: Score goals, protect your goal and beat all your opponents. Keep competing until you are the king and the best on the pitch.

title: Penguin Farm - Ice Merge
description:
Explore a world of frozen islands where penguins run their own farm. Collect resources, merge wood, build and upgrade buildings to open up new territories. Develop your settlement step by step, expand your glaciers, and watch your income grow.
Train your penguins, improve production, and head to the ocean for rewards—there drift chests filled with valuable treasures. Upgrade each building, manage your resources, and turn your small island into a thriving icy farm.

title: Offroad Muddy Trucks
description: Embark on a great adventure with huge trucks featuring massive tires and bodies in the Offroad Muddy Trucks game! You can play in either the 1 or 2 player career mode or explore a vast free map with a friend. The game offers surprises and entertaining terrain for you to discover. Let the monster truck simulator begin on muddy ground and experience all the various terrains on the map.

title: Slidee
description: In this sliding-puzzle game you will have to make your way by painting the walls. Along the way you'll encounter spikes, portals, and collapsing walls.

title: Tiles Matching
description:
Free online game Tiles Matching - play in the browser without downloading. It is suitable for the development of logic for both adults and children - an ideal timekiller.
Tiles Matching is a puzzle game combining the game mechanics of Mahjong and Three in a Row (Match-3). A logical educational game for children and adults. With each level, the difficulty increases - not everyone can complete the game the first time. Challenge your intelligence.

title: Picture Puzzles
description: the picture puzzles includes dozens of different puzzles. you can increase or decrease the number of pieces of these puzzles as you wish. so you can make it suitable for all ages. you can have a pleasant time by having fun and exercising your brain. come on we are waiting for you.

title: Moto Attack Bike Racing
description: Moto Attack - Bike Racing is a fun bike racing simulator that takes speed and action to the next level. Drive your motorcycle and race against opponents. You can use weapons to attack them. Ride your bike through challenging tracks, and avoid obstacles like people crossing the street, cabs, boxes, etc.

title: Doomsday Survival Rpg Shooter
description: Doomsday Survival Rpg Shooter is a 2D side-scrolling survival RPG shooting game. Zombies occupy the whole city. You need to recruit the last survivors to fight against zombies for a living. As humans, you need weapons, ammo, food, and medicines. Send your teammates to dispatch different buildings, go to complete the tasks in this fallen town. Time is your life, get out of the safe house and find resources!

title: Granny 3 Return the School
description: The Granny Series continues with Granny 3: Return to the School. As Granny and Slendrina pursue you, you must discover the ammunition-filled pistol and all the keys to the classrooms of the deserted school. Entering the classroom, you'll find a solitary desk labeled "Granny" and the necessary keys to unlock the closed door.

title: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game
description: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game is a chaotic puzzle hunt where you track a target brainrot through surreal, meme-soaked worlds. Each level pushes you to spot the same creature across dense, absurd scenes packed with icons like 67, Strawberry Elephant, Dragon Cannelloni, Spaghetti Tualetti, and La Supreme Combinasion. Fast-paced scanning, wild details, and pure internet nonsense create a frantic, high-energy experience for fans of intense spotting and brainrot chaos.

title: Crime Theft Gangster Paradise
description: Crime Theft Gangster Paradise is an action-packed gaming experience set in the neon-lit streets of Las Vegas. Players become ruthless gangsters, armed with a vast array of weapons. Engage in intense shootouts while collecting valuable loot

title: Bubble Shooter Witch Tower
description: Bubble Shooter: Witch Tower is a fun, free web game that takes you into a magical world of witchcraft. Ascend the Witch Tower by bursting as many bubbles as possible in this thrilling bubble-shooting puzzle adventure. Progress through levels, rescue adorable pets, and restore the Witch Tower piece by piece. With hundreds of enchanting bubble-shooting challenges, there's always something new to conquer. Play anywhere, anytime—no time limits!

title: Atlantic Sky Hunter Xtreme
description: Embark on an adrenaline-fueled journey across the open Atlantic ocean in Atlantic Sky Hunter, an arcade endless shoot 'em up airplane game where you'll face off against challenging UFOs and formidable bosses, armed with an array of power-ups including spray bullets, extra health, and twin missiles; how high can you soar in this thrilling shmup adventure?

title: Cubes 2048.io
description: Begin an exciting .io battle where Snake meets 2048 in a nervous arcade showdown. Control your cube snake, collect, merge, and grow bigger while outsmarting opponents in this classic action-puzzle game. Control your snake to navigate around the map. Collect more cubes and merge the same numbers to reach 2048. Match the same number to make it bigger.

title: Hill Climbing Mania
description: Drive over hilly tracks, collect stars, coins and pickups to upgrade your cars and get further! Also watch out for various obstacles! But you can also use them to perform some backflips... just watch your head! So, buckle up, driver! Drive from the start to finish in each level and collect coins to upgrade your cars.

title: Cartoon Moto Stunt
description: "Cartoon Moto Stunt is a gripping racing and customization game with 24 thrilling levels! Choose from 4 unique motorcycles, each with 4 eye-catching designs. Use coins earned to buy and upgrade bikes. Each level presents new challenges, requiring lightning-fast reflexes and precise timing. With vibrant cartoon graphics and addictive gameplay, it's perfect for adrenaline junkies and racing enthusiasts. Prepare for daring stunts and race to victory!"

title: Steal Brainrot Duel
description: Steal Brainrot Duel is a fast, competitive collector-raider where you hunt for the best brainrot characters, defend your base from thieves, and outsmart rivals in Solo or 2 Player mode. Start with simple picks like Noobini Pizzanini, then grind your economy to unlock rare and legendary favorites such as Tralalero Tralala, Cocofanto Elefanto, and Graipussi Medussi. Build income, raid others, protect your stash, and style your obby avatar with hats, glasses, backpacks, wings, outfits, and pets!

title: Pixel Art
description: With pixel art, paint cubes with the right colors and create pixel art. the right colors and cubes are waiting for you to paint

title: Stick: Tactics & Destruction
description: Stick: Tactics & Destruction! For fans of Stick War, Teardown, and Playground. Limited ammo, grenades, monsters, explosions. Destroy everything and win!

title: The Prism City Detectives
description: Embark on a vibrant adventure with "The Prism City Detectives" and join Luna, Ruby, Skye, Willow, Daisy, Violet, and Lumi in restoring color to their monochrome city! Explore dazzling dress-up levels and unravel hidden objects mysteries to find the missing Rainbow Gem and bring back the hues of unity.

title: Suika Kawaii Cat Merge game
description: The game is a fun, puzzle-based merging game where players control a dropper that releases animals onto the field. Players must carefully move the dropper to align and drop matching animals. When two of the same type collide, they merge into a higher-level animal. The goal is to keep merging and progressing to create new animals. Special buttons offer abilities like shaking the container or merging random animals, adding strategy and excitement to the gameplay.

title: Pim Path
description:
Reach the trophy at the end of the level to win, but it's not as easy as it might seem. You can't fall off the platforms; spikes and blades will be everywhere, making the levels more challenging. One wrong step and it's game over.
You'll need to stay calm, pay attention, be agile, have good reflexes, and most importantly, don't get angry.

title: Flying Bill
description: Fold, throw, and soar through levels with just your bills! Collect cash, unlock cool purchases, and reach for multiplier balloons. As you progress, watch everything you’ve bought transform into a big special gift.

title: Squarehead Hero
description:
Squarehead Hero is a fun, turn-based puzzle game where you help a brave, square-headed hero explore dangerous dungeons full of monsters and treasure.
Plan your moves carefully on a grid board — fight enemies, grab loot, and gear up for the next challenge.
Think you’ve got what it takes to lead Squarehead to victory? Jump in and find out!

title: Soccer Tournament
description: Soccer Tournament is a fun and fast-paced tabletop-style soccer game where you control a team of caps, flicking them to pass, shoot, and score goals. Strategize your moves, outplay your opponent, and aim for victory in this exciting, skill-based challenge!

title: Flower Fairy Adventure Story
description: Welcome to Flower Fairy Adventure Story, a casual puzzle game that you can play for free. Flower Fairy lost her wings! Embark on an adventure where you solve each tiny jigsaw, dress up your girl in pretty clothes, and pave the way for the Flower Fairy. Practice your observation, logical thinking, and hands-on ability while enjoying the relaxing and captivating puzzle game.

title: Chill Girl Clicker
description: Chill Girl Clicker is a soothing, laid-back clicker game that’s perfect for unwinding and finding your zen. Just like its predecessor, Chill Girl Clicker, this game offers a serene and calming experience, but with a delightful twist: a charming girl as the main character, bringing a fresh and enchanting vibe to your screen.

title: Mage's Secret
description: Combine monsters and increase your power by thinking every action. You have to meet monsters, complete more than 100 tasks and learn the secret of the magician.

title: Stack Sorting
description: Welcome to Stack Sorting! Your task is to organize colorful cylinders by clicking on stacks. Move the topmost cylinder to an empty stack or one with a matching top cylinder. Navigate through Easy Mode with plenty of stacks and time, or challenge yourself in Hard Mode with fewer stacks. Complete all levels within the time limit to emerge victorious!

title: Cannons Blast 3D
description: Cannons Blast 3D plays like another tower defense puzzle game. With a heavy machine gun and a cannon, you need to eliminate all incoming enemy units before they get close to your castle. Your weapon has limited ammo and reloading speed. It is necessary to make a choice of fire coverage. When you earn enough gems, you can buy the other 2 weapons and upgrade your current ones. It is time to test your shooting skills!

title: Bubble Blitz Galaxy
description: Welcome to Bubble Blitz Galaxy! Aim and shoot bubbles towards similar ones to collect them while ensuring they stay away from the borderline. Experience two exciting modes: In Arcade Mode, strive to survive as long as possible and score as much as you can. In Challenge Mode, survive and achieve target scores, facing new challenges one after another. Get ready for an exhilarating bubble-blasting adventure!

title: 2048 Run Gorgeous Balls
description: 2048 Run: Gorgeous Balls is a fun arcade game that invites you to chase high scores in a delightful environment! In this creative 2048-style game, you’ll control a colorful array of balls as they race along a dynamic track.

title: 3D Match Puzzle Mania
description: Enter the world of match-3 game brought to life in 3D. Solve captivating puzzles and collect coins to acquire power-ups. Complete daily tasks to earn fantastic bonuses and experience endless fun with every move you make!

title: My Cat Restaurant
description: Welcome to My Cat Restaurant, a casual kids cooking simulator game that you can play for free. Act as a chef and restaurant manager. Take orders, cook food, serve customers, and collect money. Plan your moves and workload in advance, and figure out an efficient routine.

title: Dice Merge
description:
Dive into Dice Merge Challenges, a game that blends strategic merging with thrilling destruction!
Dice Merge Challenges offers intuitive gameplay that's easy to pick up.
But as you progress, the challenges become more mind-bending!
Combine dice with identical numbers to trigger an explosion creating a new dice with a higher value.
Strategically merge your dice to overpower obstacles and shatter every box! Are you ready to become the ultimate Dice Merge Champion?

title: Teacher Simulator Christmas Exam
description: Welcome to the funniest and busiest Christmas classroom ever! Teacher Simulator: Christmas Exam is a charming and playful teacher class simulator where you act as a holiday teacher. Manage orders, hand out exam papers, grade tests, etc. Different classes are scheduled on different days of the week, such as art class, geography class, math class, and so on.

title: Witchy and the Puzzle Adventures
description: Help the brave Witch to pass all the puzzling tests and find all the seals to shelter them in her cozy forest house. Kittens are lost in the forest, which is full of various traps and dangers, you need to help the Witch to pass all the tests and find all the seals.

title: Car Jam: Traffic Puzzle
description: Get ready for Car Jam: Traffic Puzzle, the ultimate test of logic and fun! Untangle the traffic, move the cars, and clear the way in this addictive puzzle adventure. With every level, new challenges appear—packed parking lots, tricky buses, and colorful traffic jams waiting for your brainpower. Easy to play, hard to master, and endlessly entertaining.

title: Night Club Security
description:
Immerse yourself in the unique atmosphere of a security guard simulator inspired by the cult game I'm Security.

Check visitors for prohibited items, decide who is worthy of entry and who is not. Your power is absolute, because you are an unlimited security guard! Use your imagination to have fun and unusual "entertainment" with visitors, leaving them without things or even with a couple of bruises. Everything that happens is in your hands.

title: Princess Rescue Fruit Connect
description: Begin a fruity puzzle adventure. Princess Rescue Fruit Connect is a delightful match puzzle game where your mission is to rescue a beautiful princess by matching fruits and solving tricky levels. Connect two identical fruits to eliminate them. But notice clearing the board before time runs out. All while progressing to rescue the princess.

title: Stacking Match
description: Jenga match is a very fun puzzle game. Players need to pull out blocks of a certain color from a multi-layered tower of blocks. The pulled block will fly into the corresponding colored square. When there are three blocks of the same color in a square, it will eliminated, and a new square will appear. How many levels you can play?

title: Labubu And Me
description: Play this fun game for girls where you style your own Labubu monster and yourself! Customize Labubu with fur colors, eyes, tops, stickers, and accessories. Then, match your makeup and outfits to create the ultimate twin look. From trendy dresses and cute bags to stylish hairstyles, show off your fashion skills and creativity. Perfect for fans of Labubu games and makeover fun!

title: Wild West Match 3
description: Saddle up for a Wild West adventure in Bubble Shooter Wild West! Join Sheriff Bonnie as you pop colorful bubbles to defend your frontier town. Travel through dusty deserts, lively saloons, and scenic canyons while enjoying toe-tapping country tunes. Track your progress with detailed stats showing your best, current, and previous scores across Novice, Expert, and Master modes. With its vibrant Western visuals and exciting challenges, this bubble shooter brings cowboy spirit to every pop!

title: Face Changes
description: Face Changer is a fun puzzle game in which you have to correctly put together different faces in order to move to the next level or achieve new and better results in the training mode.

title: Solitaire Tail
description: Raise your dragons at Solitaire! Clear the game by moving all cards to the foundation! Move cards from the tableau or stockpile in ascending order of the same suit. In the tableau, you can stack cards in descending order with alternating colors! You can place a King card in an empty column! When there are no available moves, you can draw cards from the stockpile to the foundation or tableau!

title: Pirates Match The Lost Treasure
description: Enjoy this pirates adventure and find the lost treasure . Immerse yourself in an exciting match 3 game with many levels and excellent graphics. Solve all the match 3 puzzles and escape find the pirates lost treasure using your skills, and amazing power-ups to complete the levels.

title: 67 Clicker Tap Tap
description: 67 Clicker is a fast, funny, and highly addictive meme clicker game where every tap brings you closer to unlocking a strange and unforgettable collection of 67-themed characters. Your goal is simple at first: click or tap to earn 67 Points, spend them on upgrades, and keep growing your power. The ultimate objective is to reach the final upgrade, The 67 Galaxy, and unlock all 14 unique 67 characters waiting across the journey.

title: Ballpoint
description: Ballpoint is a fascinating Arkanoid game in which you have to shoot balls from a cannon and hit all the targets. Colorful backgrounds, varied levels, many variations of levels and bonuses. Try to pass all levels!

title: Supermarket Shopping For Kids
description: Have you ever dreamed of owning your own supermarket? In this casual supermarket simulator game, you can make your dream come true! In our Supermarket Shopping For Kids game, you can not only enjoy shopping but also play as a cashier and check out items! Apart from that, there are also many fun mini-games you can join in the supermarket.

title: Mermaid Princess Avater Castle
description: This is a dress-up and decorating game for girls. If you like games where you create your world, you can't miss our game. There is a group of mermaids living in the underwater world and you can live with them and create beautiful memories.

title: Bubble Sorting Infinite Remastered
description: Bubble Sorting Infinite Remastered is a fun and calming puzzle game where you sort colorful bubbles into matching tubes. Just move the bubbles around, stack 3 to 10 of the same color together, and watch them pop away! With endless levels and relaxing gameplay, it’s the perfect brain teaser to unwind anytime, anywhere.

title: Aloha Mahjong
description: Collect all the Hawaiian items in this daily Mahjong at Home game. Try to clear all tiles by pairing the same free Aloha tiles. A tile is free if it is not covered and has at least one free side.

title: Deadly Parkour
description:
Dynamic Duo:
Take control of two distinct characters, each with their own strengths and abilities. 

Precision Platforming:
Immerse yourself in the thrilling world of precision platforming, where every jump matters. Test your reflexes and hone your skills as you traverse 70 meticulously hand crafted levels.

title: Survival Island: EVO
description: Play a fun adventure and simulation game in Survival Island: EVO. You are alone on a mysterious island, and the challenge begins: survive, build, and thrive. Gather more resources like food, water, wood, and stone. And craft the tools you need to stay alive. Build your shelter, light a fire, and protect yourself from hunger and wild animals. Explore hidden corners of the island, discover secrets, and unlock new crafting recipes. Become the true survivor.

title: Skate Hooligans
description: Help the little hooligans escape from the policeman who is constantly trying to catch them. Try to collect as many bonuses and coins as possible on the road, for which you can buy new coolest skateboards and amazing characters. And do not forget to complete funny tasks, because the number of points you receive depends on this!

title: Geometry Arrow
description: Dive into an exhilarating journey through a treacherous cave! Your mission: reach the portal at the end of each level while avoiding deadly spikes and obstacles. With six progressively harder levels, you’ll need sharp reflexes and spot-on timing to survive. Can you conquer every challenge and make it out of the cave? Put your skills to the test in this high-speed action game!

title: Farm Match Seasons 2
description: Farm Match Seasons 2 is one of the new Match 3 games from the creators of the legendary Garden Tales, Forest Match and Solitaire Farm Seasons. Your friend Poppy needs your help to look after the most beautiful farm in the village. Together you will harvest strawberries, collect flowers and protect butterflies on their farm fields. What is important that you keep the farm free from weeds! The second sequel features a BIG content update with new levels and a relaxing soundtrack to enjoy!

title: The Drag Racing Challenge
description: Welcome to The Drag Racing Challenge game, an exciting new arcade racing game! Race through challenging missions, unlock and upgrade over 12 cars, and compete against opponents with customizable vehicles. Test your skills in realistic maps across five cities and enjoy smooth, high-quality racing. No fuel or time limits—just endless drag racing fun!

title: Hazmob FPS
description: Hazmob FPS is an intense first-person shooter that blends tactical depth with fast-paced action. Players engage in strategic, team-based battles across diverse maps, utilizing customizable loadouts and a variety of game modes. Explore vibrant ocean scenes teeming with mermaids and sea creatures as you sharpen your observation skills to uncover subtle distinctions. Immerse yourself in the magic of the deep blue and embark on an adventure of keen-eyed discovery!

description: Play Rotate Rings - Circle Puzzle free online and test your skills in a clever browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Twist and align colorful rings in a satisfying logic puzzle that challenges your strategy like a true brain game. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for focused, mind-bending fun anytime.

description: Touch the screen and slide your finger along the glowing line without lifting it. Avoid barriers, stay clear of the edges, and react quickly as the speed increases. Customize your ball and tail, face dynamic obstacles, and enjoy endlessly generated paths that keep every run fast, challenging, and addictive.

The school is not ready for you!
Broken laptops, chairs in splinters, the dining room is looted!
Revenge is a dish served in the form of chaos!
Forget about the silent protest – only crushing anarchy!
Make your classmates regret it!
The teacher is in a panic!
The head teacher is furious!

description:
This game has incorporated the best of famous tank games. 
You can choose the tank that you like best, or prefer a more powerful version. Go to the levels and defend your base from the enemy. At your disposal are more than 15 types of tanks with various upgrades: armor, upgrades of the first, second and third levels. These improvements will help you gain an advantage over the enemy tank army.

title: Force Master 3D
description: Force Master 3D is a battle Math online game for boys for free. In the game, all the enemies are waiting for you at each level. You need to give priority to attacking monsters lower than yourself. The more monsters you attack, the higher your level will be. Be sure to pay attention to your own strength, because only in this way can you not be destroyed by the enemy!

title: Whats Grandma Hiding
description:
Embark on a mysterious journey, where your grandma tasked you with restoring a mansion that you never knew your family had. 

Search for clues scattered throughout the estate, piecing together the mystery and unlocking hidden truths as you delve deeper into the enigmatic past. 

Utilize rewarded ads to gain valuable coins or expedite the deciphering process, enhancing your investigative prowess in this immersive item-searching adventure.

title: Fashionista Avatar Studio Dress Up
description: It is a fun, creative dress-up and hairstyling game for all ages. Players mix and match outfits, hairstyles, and accessories to create stylish looks. The game features cute characters, diverse clothing options, and a salon scene for designing unique hairstyles, colors, and headpieces. Enjoy endless fashion fun and creativity in a joyful, relaxed atmosphere.

description: Obby is skateboarding on the rooftops and performing dangerous tricks. He wants to skateboard on the rooftops during Halloween. Help Obby reach the finish line safely. You must be very careful! Since it's Halloween, the city is flooded with toxic water, and if you fall from the building, you will die. Jump from barrels to containers and climb to the top of the building. Collect all the pumpkins along the way to earn money. Gather all the pumpkins and reach the finish line!

title: Baling Bum
description: Jump into Baling Bum, a hilarious arcade adventure packed with silly challenges, funny levels, and nonstop action. Perfect for students looking for cool math games, silly games, or quick school break fun. Play free online, test your reflexes, and laugh with every move. This casual game mixes arcade chaos with funny bum battles, making it a must-play for fans of funny games, free kids games, and online school games. Can you survive the bum escape?

title: Plane Crash Ragdoll Simulator
description: As a fearless pilot, your mission is simple: survive a relentless onslaught of rockets targeting your aircraft. Take the controls of a variety of planes and helicopters, each with unique skins to unlock and customize. Your goal is to navigate through perilous skies and bring your aircraft to the ground without crashing. But be warned: if you touch the ground, your aircraft will be exploded!

description:
Cute characters race on the platform to collect water drops and fill the pools. To use the aquapark slides you need to fill the mini pools. Collect water drops and try to knock down the opponents. To get better, you can use bombs, booster boxes and doors that give positive bonuses. Try to finish first in this fun race!

Game Features:
- Colorful and fun map designs
- 1 and 2 Player game modes
- Different hats available for characters
- Surprise bonuses and game mechanics

title: Mobile Phone Case Diy
description: This is a mobile phone case game that was designed. Have you ever wanted to create a fashion phone case of your own? In the game, you can show your creativity, enjoy the art of customisation and see your phone evolve the way you like. You can choose your favourite colours, draw, mix, and spray paint your phone case.

title: Princess Valentines Crush
description: Welcome to Princess Valentine’s Crush game. Princess Elsa has a crush on Jack Frost. She Invited Jack to the valentine’s party. Both have a plan to do some makeovers and enjoy taking some photos to post on social media. Join and help the beautiful couples. Have fun!

description:
The endless card game "C21A" is an exciting combination of classic blackjack and addictive strategy. In this game, your goal is to collect cards to score 21 points. But be careful not to overdo it or you will lose! The game offers endless opportunities to develop and improve your skills.
The game "C21A" is a great way to pass your time and test your skills in card games.

title: Madness: Sheriff’s Compound OFFICIAL

title: Teacher Simulator
description: Teacher Simulator is a fun simulation game in which you play the role of a teacher. Mark exams and ensure the kids are on their best behavior. You may have been the student, but now you get to be the one in charge!

description: Match and clear all the tile in this Hidden Pairs Mahjong solitaire game. Use your observation skills to find and select identical open tiles to remove them from the board. With beautifully designed classic Mahjong symbols, smooth animations, and a calming background, each level offers a fresh puzzle challenge.Earn bonus time, increase your score, and progress through endless levels of tile-matching fun!

description:
Brainrot Clicker is a hilarious and chaotic idle clicker game that plunges you into a bizarre world of meme-fueled madness. Your mission is simple: tap the screen to earn “Italian Brainrot Points” and unlock increasingly ridiculous AI-generated characters from the internet’s wildest corners.

title: Kings and Queens Match 2

Join Princess Bella on a magical adventure, matching jewels and crowns to uncover hidden treasures. Create powerful boosters like Royal Bombs, hammers, and arrows to clear obstacles and win big. Stunning graphics and an enchanting soundtrack bring the kingdom to life. Get ready for a royal journey full of fun and surprises!

Amass a fortune and transform into a wealthy business magnate! Begin with a modest casino and embark on a mission to elevate your enterprise and ascend as a tycoon of capitalism. Expand your casino by constructing new floors, boosting your idle funds, and upgrading the premises for an unforgettable gambling experience!

title: Horror Minecraft Partytime
description: Horror Minecraft Partytime is a spooky and interesting horror survival game. This time you will enter a familiar world of blocks. In this hide-and-seek mode, you will be the pursuer, looking for every corner. Find the weirdo in disguise and catch him.

title: Key Quest
description: Golden Key is a challenging escape game where you must solve a series of puzzles to escape mysterious rooms. Use logic and memory to find useful items, uncover secrets, and solve clever riddles until you discover the Golden Key.

title: Math Master
description: Unleash your inner math whiz! Math Master turns numbers into art—solve fun math problems to unlock drawing tools, sketch colorful shapes, and bring numerical puzzles to life. Perfect for learners and creativity lovers alike!

Fight as a lone brave stickman against the tyranny and Evil

Share your high scores with friends and compete with them.

title: Microplastics Feeding
description: Microplastics Feeding is a game about a hungry fish who is looking for its favorite food: plastic! Help the fish to eat all the plastic things in the ocean!

title: Ultimate Plants TD
description: Ultimate Plants TD is an army of plants to protect your garden from countless zombies. Your goal is to protect your garden from challenging waves of zombies. Experimenting with different plant combinations and positioning is the key to maximizing your defense capabilities and overcoming tough challenges!

title: Monster Vs Zombie
description: Slide the monster to help it eat all the zombies in the way. Use your strategic thinking and problem solving skill to avoid all obstacle and reach the gate to go to the next level.

title: Squad Assembler
description:
Assemble a cool squad and see who wins!
Combine items to improve the fighters' equipment! Combine weapons and armor, buy loot boxes with new weapons!
You can create cool, unique characters, each of which will have certain skills! Buy parts for your fighters, change their arms, torso, head! Create real cyborgs to defeat the enemy! Merge armor and weapons, increase the levels and characteristics of items. Hire cool heroes who will help you in tough battles.

title: Snap Fix
description:
Snap Fix is a fast-paced block puzzle game where you slide tiles to restore a scrambled picture.
With one empty space to maneuver, you must think quickly and arrange the grid before time runs out!
Complete the puzzle to unlock and download the image as a reward.
Can you snap everything into place before the clock hits zero?

title: Gummy merge
description: Jelly merge is an endless game in which to merge identical marmalades. The goal of the game is to reach the final marmalade.

title: Merge Master
description: A casual mobile game centered around matching and elimination. The game features vibrant colors, coupled with a visual style rich in beach elements. With background music and sound effects reminiscent of leisurely walks along the beach, it creates a relaxed beach-strolling environment that immerses players in an auditory experience.

title: VSCO Girl Aesthetic
description: Welcome to the VSCO Girl Aesthetic. Rainbow High school girls Sunny, Skyler, Ruby, and Violet are the trendy fashion girls. They planned to try VSCO fashion which is trending all over social media. Join and browse their wardrobe to pick some suitable outfits for the girls. Play and Have fun!

title: Brain Draw Line
description:
Brain Draw Line is a minimalist puzzle game where you must complete shapes using a single, continuous line. There are no timers or unnecessary distractions — the focus is purely on precision and planning. Each level presents a unique figure that you must finish without lifting your finger or mouse and without crossing the line twice.
The experience is calm, strategic, and rewarding — ideal for players who enjoy logic-based challenges.

title: Blue Mushroom Cat Run
description: Catch the mischievous thief in Blue Mushroom Cat Run! A cunning thief has snatched your gold, and guess what? Unlock vibrant worlds and zoom through endless obstacles in this action-packed runner. From sun-kissed beaches to neon-lit night streets, every map offers fresh surprises and heart-pounding thrills.

title: Spot&Differs
description: A new exciting game "Spot&Differs" for children and adults! Find differences between two pictures and train your brain and mindfulness. If you like to play logic games, join us!

title: Bomb Evolution
description: Bomb Evolution is a cannon-shooting arcade game. On the mysterious and mist-shrouded island, you have the opportunity to strategically establish not one, but three main bases, bolstered by an additional rocket. Engage in an enthralling battle against a formidable opponent, both of you operating under identical circumstances. Your ultimate objective: obliterating all the enemy's main bases positioned on the neighboring fog-laden island. May victory in this war be your prized accomplishment!

title: Robocarpoli
description:
In Brooms Town, you must solve four amazing adventures:

Problems with the pipes: 
In Brooms Town, a water pipe broke and the road is getting flooded. Help the Rescue Team to solve these situations completing 6 games: 
    • Connect the wires in Jin’s invention
    • Block the water leaks as soon as possible.
    • Solve Poli’s maze.
    • Work in a team with Micky.
    • Help Roy with the hoses.
    • Make Bruner as clean as a whistle.

title: Mobile Phone Case Design & DIY
description: Welcome to Mobile Phone Case Design & DIY, the ultimate playground for those who love to personalize, design, and express their unique style!

title: Unlock the Bolts
description: Unlock the Bolts is a challenging puzzle game where you carefully remove screws to solve mechanical puzzles. Each level tests your logic and precision as you figure out the correct order to unlock the bolts. In special levels, the stakes are even higher—you must free trapped animals by unlocking the right bolts! With satisfying mechanics and engaging challenges, this game will keep you thinking and entertained. Can you master every puzzle and rescue the animals in need?

title: Tony Archer
description:
Evil hooligans have caught your friends, free them quickly and punish the villains!
You are the great Tony Archer, a dude who masterfully handles all types of weapons, can run fast and is a former military man! In his hands, even a stick becomes a deadly weapon! And Tony Archer knows how to stealthily eliminate enemies. Every villain in this city will be punished and all the main character's friends will be saved! Fight on city rooftops, secret laboratories and enemy military complexes.

title: Mr. Drifter: Car Chase Simulator
description:
Run fast, crash hard, and cheat death — in style.

Race through a chaotic low-poly city as you dodge police, traffic, and total destruction. Use game-changing power-ups like Slow-Mo, Freeze, and EMP Blasts to escape the impossible.

Unlock wild getaway cars
⚡ Grab power-ups mid-chase
 Smash through obstacles & roadblocks
Stylized low-poly world with top-down tilt
Endless cops. Infinite chaos.

One rule: don’t stop. How long can you stay free?

title: Sort Water Now
description: A fascinating puzzle journey, a mysterious water sorting adventure, waiting for your experience!Rich and fascinating levels and a variety of props combination, let the classic puzzle game take on a new look!

title: 2 Player Games Kids Kitchen
description: Do you want to run your own restaurant? Want to experience the blend of collaboration and cooking fun? Join H5games4u's best restaurant tycoon game and enjoy cooking fun. You will engage in different gaming modes. The best part is that you can work together with your friends in the virtual restaurant!

title: Elytra Flight
description: Elytra Flight is an endless flying adventure inspired by the legendary Elytra wings. Players take to the skies in a fast-paced challenge where reflexes and strategy decide how long they can survive. Whether solo or in 2 player mode, the game blends arcade action with survival mechanics, offering a fresh and rewarding experience every flight.

title: Mahjong Online
description: Mahjong Online is the classic version of the ancient board game that requires you to clear the board by matching the same patterned tiles. The rules dictate that there must be two or more of the same tiles to clear tiles from the play area and successfully win the game.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Xeno Defense Protocol
description: Xeno Online combines high-octane top-down shooting with strategic tower defense and deep RPG progression. Your mission is simple: Establish a base, defend it against endless waves of insectoid horrors, and extract with your life.

title: Matching Puzzle
description:
Paintings blocks fall from the sky.
When you touch the ground, the pictures are covered, remember that picture and guess the same picture.
If you match the picture quickly, you can get additional points as a combo.

title: Mahjong Four Rivers
description: Discover the engaging world of Mahjong Four Rivers – a fresh take on the classic puzzle game. With its traditional charm and modern gameplay, it’s perfect for sharpening your observation and strategy skills. Enjoy beautifully designed tiles and the rewarding challenge of clearing the board. Play for free on your phone or computer, wherever you are.

title: Cubatoria Merge 2048
description:
Welcome to the exciting world of Cubatoria Merge 2048! This game combines elements of the classic 2048 game with a three-dimensional visual design, which makes it unique and exciting.

The game is designed for fans of puzzles, logic games and those who appreciate a creative approach to classic concepts. Cubatoria Merge 2048 promises an exciting immersion in virtual space with the opportunity to enjoy a new visual experience.

title: Fairy Wingerella
description: Soar through the skies with Fairy Wingerella in this action-packed arcade adventure! Meet Wingerella, a fearless and ambitious fairy striving to become the most powerful of her kind. Embark on her magical journey, navigating enchanting skies and conquering exciting challenges. With captivating visuals and engaging gameplay, this adventure promises endless fun and excitement!

title: Just Dice - Random Tower Defence
description: ? Welcome to "Just Dice: Random Tower Defense"! Get ready to roll the dice and defend your territory against hordes of relentless monsters in this exciting tower defense game. With a unique merging mechanic and vibrant visuals, you'll be hooked from the very first roll!

title: Car Parking Simulator
description: Car Parking Simulator is a driving challenge game you won't be able to put down! Whether you want to tackle challenging levels or practice precision parking, you can choose from different modes to start your adventure. From compact car models to heavy-duty truck options, every level offers a fresh driving challenge. As you progress, the levels become more demanding, turning every success into a rewarding challenge.

title: Stunt Fury
description: Stunt Fury takes adrenaline-fueled stunts to new heights in this action-packed gaming experience. Strap in and prepare to defy gravity as you showcase your skills on a variety of daring platforms. With heart-pounding excitement around every corner, this game challenges players to push the limits of physics and creativity.

title: Idle Bank
description: Idle Bank is not merely a management game but also a simulation game. With 3D stickman characters in a bank, you can control the manager to develop a bank. First, you can use the starting money to unlock a basic Reception to absorb customers. When people come into the bank and save their money here, you can take away them to unlock new facilities and hire assistants. Don't forget to upgrade your character for better capacity ability and higher speed.

title: Kids Supermarket
description: Welcome to Kids Supermarket, a casual supermarket simulation game for kids. Have you ever gone shopping alone? Feel confused about finding goods among a large number of products? Join Kids Supermarket to elevate your observation and categorization skills. Our diverse and clearly aligned products will make you feel like shopping in a real-life supermarket. Pick up your shopping basket and start your journey in the supermarket.

title: Carnage Battle Arena
description:
Get Carnage now and discover a new kind of racing game! Driving fast and getting to the finish line is only one of the multiple challenges that await you. Wreak havoc on the streets thanks to the extensive destruction model that lets you not only damage vehicles, but also cause visible changes in the environment. After a long battle, the location will look nothing like it used to at the start!

Whichever mode you choose, get ready for loads of adrenaline-pumping action! Play Carnage now!

title: Around Elbrus
description: In the game “Around Elbrus”, the player controls a character who rushes down Mount Elbrus. The goal of the game is to collect all the coins and overcome various obstacles such as rocks, cliffs and avalanches. The game features beautiful graphics and addictive gameplay and is suitable for players of all ages.

title: Halloween Store Sort
description: In Halloween Store Sort, match spooky toys and Halloween decorations by dragging them between shelves. Create sets of three to clear the shelves and reveal hidden ones above or to the sides of the screen. With many levels and increasing difficulty, each level has a time limit, so think fast! Use the shuffle button if you get stuck. Complete all levels to win and become the ultimate Halloween sorting champion!

title: Classic Mine Sweeper
description: Dive back into "Mine Sweeper Classic," the ultimate nostalgic puzzle game from the Windows XP era, perfect for strategic gameplay during any downtime. Challenge yourself with levels from beginner to expert and relive the excitement of this timeless classic.

title: Tap Bead
description: Tap Bead is a relaxing puzzle game. Arrange beads by color to match patterns and clear levels. Simple controls, soft visuals, and many levels make it a soothing, satisfying experience.

title: Color Brain Test Games
description: Color Brain Test Game is a ring puzzle game. Do you want to train your brain?  You love fun spinning circle puzzle games with simple and colorful gameplay. Play Color Brain Test Games now!

title: Granny GTA Vegas
description: Granny GTA Vegas drops the infamous horror legend into the heart of sin city! Armed and unhinged, Granny escapes her haunted house and brings chaos to the neon streets of Las Vegas. With red-hooded masked enemies hot on her trail, she must shoot her way through crime-ridden alleys, casino districts, and the Vegas Strip.

title: Fish Story 3
description: Welcome to Fish Story 3! Immerse yourself in 4,000+ levels of Match 3 excitement guided by our mermaid host. Solve puzzles, conquer Daily Missions, and unlock treasures in the Daily Challenge. Dive into addictive challenges and return daily for rewards. Join the underwater adventure now!

title: Home Island
description:
Looking for a family adventure game? Try our Home Island: Family Pin free puzzle games about village life in paradise island! Pull the pin to solve the puzzle, follow the story and enjoy adventures on the island.
On the adventure for discovering the new island, a family cruise ship plane had to face an accident because of the bad weather. The father has gone missing, but the mother and their daughter luckily survived and got to a strange island.

title: Sea Monsters Mahjong
description: Dive into 'Sea Monsters Mahjong,' an underwater twist on the classic game. Match sea monster tiles strategically—remember, you can only draw tiles that are on top of a stack with no blocks on their sides. Explore the depths, revealing krakens, dolphins, and mermaids. With easy controls and oceanic vibes, enjoy a relaxing Mahjong experience with charming sea creatures.

title: Pixel Destroyer
description:
Pixel Destroyer is an exciting physics-based arcade puzzle game where your goal is to destroy colorful pixel shapes using bouncing balls.

Dive into a world of pixel destruction! In this game, you’ll need to use your wits and precision. Each level features a unique shape made of pixel blocks. Your objective is to destroy them all using a limited number of shots. The balls follow the laws of physics, bouncing off walls and obstacles, allowing you to reach even the most hard-to-access blocks.

title: Crazy Office: Slap and Smash!
description: Crazy Office: Slap and Smash! is a slapstick beat-em-up that turns a dull office into a hilarious battlefield.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Space Raider
description: Blast your way through the galaxy in intense battles. Enjoy beautiful graphic and exciting gameplay with tons of enemies as customizable ships.

title: High Heels 2
description: Stack rider new run adventure game with high heels, swipe to collect heels and make tall stack heels, and cross bricks and reach the destination. Have a good time.

title: Cute Folding Paper
description: Cute Folding Paper is an origami online puzzle game. Combines the creative fun of paper crafts with challenging logic puzzle challenges, making it the perfect game for kids and family play .Perfect for children and good for practicing logic, reasoning, and problem-solving skills. Step by step, solve puzzling origami puzzles where the order of folding is the key to clearing the level.What are you waiting for? If you like our games, please share them with your friends to double the fun!

title: One Line
description: One Line is a casual art drawing game where your mission is to use a single line to protect an innocent man from a series of unfortunate events. From shielding him against heavy rain to fending off aggressive bees and even angry giants, each level presents a new challenge. Get creative and use the power of One Line to ensure he stays safe, all while enjoying the simple yet satisfying drawing mechanics. The more you play, the more you'll need to think outside the box to keep him protected!

title: Juicy Match 2
description: Juicy Match 2 returns with even more natural, fresh, and juicy fun! Step into the best Juice Bar in town and match delicious fruits to create perfect juice blends. Your cheerful Banana friend will guide you with helpful tips along the way. Match three or more fruits to juice them, trigger chain reactions for big bonuses, and master hundreds of new levels. With Daily Missions, Weekly Challenges, and endless juicy puzzles, the adventure never stops in Juicy Match 2!

title: Hero Transform Race
description: Hero Transform Race is an action-packed and fun parkour game that transforms you from an ordinary person into a legendary superhero. Your goal is to reach the end of the track by transforming into the appropriate superhero form for the obstacles you encounter!

title: Paper.io 2
description:
Conquer as much territory as possible and beat the competition.
A smooth drawing experience!

Use your paper block to steal the area from your online opponents in this game. Capture as much space as possible and try to get the highest score in the lobby. If you move outside your own color, your tail becomes exposed. You will be eliminated when someone manages to catch your tail. So you need to take risks to expand your colored area.

title: Perfect Job Run
description: Run your way to the perfect job. In the Perfect Job Run, you'll run the platform of the workplace. Facing various challenges, selecting the right career path and becoming a winner in the workplace. There will be different career tests along the way. Quickly select tools to accomplish tasks.

title: Color Yarn Sort
description: Color Yarn Sort is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you need to sort colorful spools of yarn into their matching buckets. The challenge? You have limited space to place the buckets, and you must think carefully about which bucket to move forward. Each yarn color must be placed in its corresponding bucket, but you can only move the buckets into the available spaces—there’s no room for error!

title: Office Pyramid Solitaire
description: Your objective in Office Pyramid Solitaire is to clear the card pyramid. On hard difficulty you must also clear the draw deck.

title: Vex X3M
description:
VEX X3M, a new extreme hill racing game with bike stunts and obstacles, is here! 
Enjoy the classic Vex elements, but this time you will be racing your way to the finish line! 

Perform crazy bike stunts in 30 unique levels filled with danger - from spikes and shooting knives to rockets and lasers. Reach the finish safely and obtain stars to unlock new unique bike skins.

Complete all levels in easy and hard mode to crown yourself a master VEX X3M Rider.

Start your engines and enjoy VEX X3M!

title: Chibi Doll - Avatar Creator
description:
Street - it's no matter build your modern city life or just stick with village-like town world you always be enjoy with it! 

Room - decorate and design home girly world.

Gacha - unlock countless gachapon surprises your lovely avatar, bring gacha to your fantasy life! 

Dress Up Games - match and mix more than 5000+ girly items for dressing up princess: hairstyle, clothes, hats, accessories, freckles, moles, blush, wings, tails.

title: Jelly-Belly. Make the Elephant
description: It is a puzzle like "Watermelon game" where you need drop animals in a container and try not to cross the top line. Animals of the same type will combine and create a larger animal. Merge the animals to create the biggest animal - Elephant.

title: Family Tree Emoji
description:
Is a logic game that combines the excitement of deciphering with the surprise of bizarre combinations.

The game will come across family trees with missing cells, you need to choose the emoji that fits into that gap.

Look at the parents and children to find commonalities and complete all levels.

title: Earthquake io
description: Earthquake io is a realistic 3D physics-based disaster simulator in which you take control of the forces of the Earth to destroy cities, destroy buildings and crush all small objects to compete with other players in a fierce battle.

title: My Parking Lot
description: Welcome to "My Parking Lot," the ultimate puzzle challenge! Navigate through a chaotic mess of cars stuck in a parking lot and strategize to safely remove each vehicle without crashing them into each other. Your goal? Clear the parking lot by guiding all the cars to the exit, unlocking new levels as you master the art of precision parking. Can you untangle the traffic and solve each puzzle with finesse? Test your skills in "My Parking Lot" now!

title: Link Flow
description: Enter the mesmerizing world of Link Flow, where logic meets creativity in a captivating puzzle experience! In this minimalist yet visually stunning game, your goal is simple: connect the dots with seamless lines, recreating intricate patterns that test your problem-solving skills.

title: Island Battle 3D
description: Jump and survive in Island Battle 3D, a 3D IO game that will keep you on your toes. You will play as a jumper who must avoid falling off the island. You will also have to knock back your enemies and be the last one standing. You will face a strategic challenge, as the island’s surface is constantly breaking and changing. You can use this to your advantage and push your rivals into the gaps. But watch out, they can do the same to you.

title: Sid & Ginny Y2K Glam Clash
description: Welcome to the Y2K style fashion world! Two charismatic heroines are waiting for you, ready to try on fashion trends from the 2000s. Create spectacular makeup for them with lip gloss, shining shadows and glossy skin; choose stylish hairstyles - from smooth straight hair to playful ponytails and fashionable hairpins. Experiment with low-cut jeans, crop tops, mini skirts, shiny fabrics, and bold combinations. Complete the resulting image with iconic accessories of those years.

title: Hexa GO!
description: A puzzle game about dropping hexagons from grid. To do this, use a bomb and explode all the tiles nearby! Click on the rotate-button and swap the tiles! And also use other special tiles!

title: Tile Hex World: Red vs Blue
description:
Build and destroy!
Take part in an exciting battle between Blue and Red! This time, you will have to extract resources, construct buildings and even build entire islands!
To ​​fight the enemy, you will need to build a path to his island.
Chop down trees, process resources into building hexes, with which you can expand your territory!
The winner is the one who captures the enemy flag and subjugates the enemy army!

title: Uncle Hit: Punch the Dummy
description: Uncle Hit: Punch the Dummy is a fast-paced action game where you take out your frustration on a relentless, annoying dummy. With quick reflexes and nonstop punches, you’ll unleash a flurry of blows in simple, satisfying bursts. Stay sharp, keep hitting, and enjoy every moment of chaotic stress relief wrapped in hilarious impact.

title: Dungeon Master – Cult & Craft
description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of a mysterious dungeon, where you are its keeper and master! Turn simple stickmen into devoted followers capable of mining ore and creating value for your dark empire. Develop the Cult, manage resources and expand the boundaries of your underground Universe!

title: Fruit Sort Logic
description: Fruit Sort Logic is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you sort colorful fruit juices on shelves. Move the juices around and match three of the same kind to clear a shelf. Space is limited, so each move matters. Clear all shelves to finish the level and unlock new ones. With smooth controls, bright visuals, and endless levels, the game is easy to play and satisfying to master. Perfect for a calm but clever puzzle experience.

title: Brawl Stars Battle
description: Brawl Stars Battle is an exciting action shooting game where you control powerful heroes armed with guns and special abilities to defeat opponents in fast-paced combat! Select 3v3 battle mode and fight alongside your teammates. The team that kills fifteen opponents first wins. Use guns and powerful abilities in intense battles.

title: Okay
description: Okay is a minimalist puzzle game where your goal is to clear every element from the board by drawing a single strategic line. Each line you draw interacts with the objects on screen — if it hits them correctly, they disappear. The challenge lies in predicting the trajectory and eliminating everything with just one attempt.

title: Spin Shot Siege
description: In "Spin Shot Siege," take control of a gunner on a rotating tower. Enemy tanks orbit around you in the opposite direction. Each level has tanks following paths like diamonds, circles, rectangles, or triangles. Aim carefully and destroy all tanks before running out of ammo. Can you master the spin and win the siege?

title: Bus Jam
description: Welcome to the thrilling world of "Bus Jam: Clear the Bus Stop," presented by Golden Guns Studio, a color sort puzzle, fun-packed game where your task is to skillfully bus match 3d passengers onboard onto buses of the same color. Imagine a busy Bus Jam stop with vibrant buses and puzzled passengers eager to board. Your mission? Ensure each person finds their way to the right bus, and brace yourself as the color puzzle master.

title: Crazy Screw King
description: This is Unscrew All! More than simple matching, swiftly remove screws into same-colored bins. Glass slides down with each success! Release stress, show skill, become the Screw Master!

title: Parkour World 2
description:
Welcome to Parkour World 2, an exhilarating Minecraft-inspired parkour game with thrilling challenges and delightful gameplay. 
-Each level in this game boasts its own distinct and features, ensuring a fresh and exciting experience every time you play. 
-While the initial levels may seem relatively simple, as you progress through the game. By the time you conquer the first ten levels, you'll find yourself facing increasingly demanding obstacles.
-Get ready to run, and conquer in Parkour World!

title: Fruit Merge Reloaded
description: Dive into the juicy and colorful world of Fruit Merge Reloaded, a captivating merging game that combines the addictive gameplay of 2048 with the sweetness of your favorite fruits! Your task is to merge identical fruits to create new and exotic varieties, aiming to reach the ultimate fruit fusion.

title: Fashion Princess - Dress Up for Girls
description: Join the ultimate 3D fashion game for girls! Dress up your princess, win fashion races, and impress the judges with stunning outfits. Unlock new models, hairstyles, and dances as you collect crystals. Show off your style and become a fashion queen—play now for free!

title: Balloon Match 3D
description: Relax and enjoy this addictive ballons 3d matching game as you collect items and complete different missions.Your goal is to clear the bubble by finding and matching all ballons before the time runs out!

title: Stickman Adventure
description: This is an adventure that will take you through time and space! Along the way, you'll encounter various traps and monsters; you'll need to defeat them and rescue your friends. Come on, Hero, a whole new world awaits!

title: Nutcracker New Years Adventures
description: Welcome to the world of a fairy tale, where two princesses are preparing for a series of winter holidays. Each of the princesses is working on creating her own unique New Year's outfit, inspired by Hoffmann's mystical fairy tales and Tchaikovsky's classical ballet. Immersing themselves in the atmosphere of New Year's magic, players will be able not only to dress princesses, but also to develop their sense of style. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure and create your own New Year's image!

title: WormsArena.io
description: A great Snake IO game is beginning with the Worms Arena IO game! The baits are all around the map and collect them to make your snake the largest of the arena. Make strategic moves and trap your opponents to make them fail. Try to achieve the highest score and wear the crown. Unlock new snakes at the marketplace with coins. Let the super snake adventure begin!

title: Restaurant Simulator: Burgers & Pizza
description:
"Restaurant Simulator: Burgers & Pizza" is an exciting cooking and business management game where you become the owner of a fast food establishment. Prepare delicious burgers, tasty pizza, and other dishes while building a restaurant empire!

Features:
Real-time cooking - fulfill orders, combine ingredients
Varied menu - burgers, pizza, fries, drinks & desserts
Business growth - open new locations, hire staff
Economic strategy - manage finances, increase profits

title: Block TNT Blast
description: Block TNT Blast is an exciting sandbox simulation game that will ignite your imagination and strategic skills. In this game, players are tasked with strategically placing bombs to demolish various objects and earn diamonds. These diamonds are then used to unlock a wide range of powerful bombs, adding to the explosive mayhem. With its captivating gameplay and stunning graphics, Block TNT Blast offers endless hours of entertainment for players of all ages.

title: Color 3D - Bump It Up
description:
The main principle is pretty simple – you are controlling a small ball that is always moving forward.

On your way, there are a few obstacles that you need to get through. There’s a small problem however, because you can only touch obstacles that are the same color as your ball. If you touch an obstacle with a different color, the game ends and you need to start from the beginning.

title: Goo Slime Jump
description: Goo Slime Jump is a fun and relaxing casual game, tap to make the slime jump and make sure it reaches the finish line, the relaxing music and calm gameplay make you addicted.

title: Two Stunt Racers
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning sports car through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Pool Merge
description:
This is an arcade puzzle with billiard physics and 2048 merge mechanics. Shoot balls, combine identical ones and score points!
Game modes:
Classic: plan your moves, avoid overflowing the field. With each new open ball level, the limit of allowed balls on the playing field increases.
Arcade: play for time, do not let the balls fall into the holes. Merging balls adds time to the timer, balls that fall into the holes take time away.

title: Hexa Sort: Winter Edition
description: Step into a mesmerizing world of winter puzzles with Hexa Sort! More than just a game, it’s a journey into a frosty realm where every hexagonal tile sparkles like a snowflake. Match and merge the pieces to create perfect combinations, clearing the way for new challenges as snow crystals gently dissolve.

title: Geometry Rush
description: Geometry Rush will take you to a world of challenging and treacherous platforming. Are you ready to run through trap-filled passages, jump and dodge death? Learn from your mistakes, perfect your reflexes, master the path without a single slip and advance to the next level.

title: Parkour Obby
description: Dive into the ultimate parkour adventure with Parkour Obby! Immerse yourself in a world of stunning, blocky beauty inspired by iconic Minecraft graphics. Leap, sprint, and climb through meticulously crafted levels, each more breathtaking than the last. From towering cliffs to dazzling pixelated landscapes, every jump tests your skills, timing, and creativity.

title: Dark Myth: Monkey Merge
description: Merge warriors, build your army, and fight through hordes of monsters as the Monkey King! Your master and companions have been captured — combine strategy and action to rescue them all. From Common to Legendary, every merge makes you stronger.

title: Dop Puzzle Erase Master
description:
It is an interesting online game that will take you to an unparalleled puzzle-solving  experience. To solve the puzzles, you may use your imagination and ingenuity. You need to consider what do I erase to pass the level. Within the challenging levels, you  need to use strategic thinking to conquer each puzzle. In each level, you must make use of the
  eraser to erase a part of the picture to show a hidden object or scene. The deletion puzzles are  easy to learn, but challenging to master.

title: Cryptograph
description: This is a fascinating word puzzle game based on cryptograms. In the game, it is necessary to decipher words using numerical encoding. The gameplay is designed for sequential completion of levels, where each level is a quote or motivational saying. The game allows you to train your attention. A great way to have a pleasant time.

title: Drive To Survive
description:
Dive into the world of the zombie apocalypse, where your car is the only weapon!
Shoot down hordes of zombies, earn money and unlock new powerful cars.

Earn money - use your skills to become a master of survival!
Buy cars - from classics to supercars!
Explore new locations - each level is full of challenges!

Show the zombies who's boss!

title: Mojicon Garden Connect
description: Looking for a relaxing puzzle break? The 6th Mojicon game is here to help you unwind! Mojicon Garden Connect brings the beauty of spring right to your screen. Connect colorful tiles at your own pace and watch the garden come to life. As you play, you'll unlock 20 fun, hidden Discoveries featuring adorable garden friends. Now lighter and smoother than ever, it’s the perfect polished puzzle for your downtime.

title: Live Star Doll Dress Up
description: Discover the makeover world of fashion and fun in Live Star Doll Dress Up Games! Immerse yourself in an interactive magic princess universe! In this dress-up anime simulator, you're in charge. Dress up your doll in trendy outfits. Get creative with makeup and personalize your cute doll!

title: Grow A Garden | Growden.io
description: Growden.io is an .io farming game where you manage a small plot of land, starting off with some carrot seeds and a vision for success! This community-based game is based on progressive management of your farm, so be sure to stay logged in to get the whole experience.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: BlockPuzzle : Color Blast
description:
"Block Puzzle" is a fun and classic block game!
