And our Block Puzzle is not just that. It is more Simple and addictive! Once you start, you will not stop playing. Just have a try, you will love it!

title: Meme Mukbang ASMR Game
description: Welcome to Meme Mukbang ASMR Game, the ultimate livestream mukbang experience! Step into the world of a quirky mukbang streamer, where you’ll indulge in delicious dishes and share your mukbang ASMR moments with a growing audience. The more you eat and interact, the more you earn, all while building your fame in the livestream world!

title: Blob Hero
description: In Blob Hero, you become a brave hero facing endless waves of enemies and monsters! This survival game offers a true rogue adventure experience. You control a blob hero, choose basic skills and upgrade to survive.

title: Gluttony
description: In Gluttony, you control a giant hole with endless appetite! Move around, swallow everything, and grow like in snake games or Hole.io. But watch out—you’re allergic to cute monsters, so dodge them to survive! Perfect for fans of .io games, eat games, and cool math games students love at school. With fun challenges, addictive arcade action, and silly gameplay, Gluttony is the ultimate free kids game to play anytime.

title: Pyramidz
description: Unleash the power of the gods in PyramidZ, a twist on the classic Match-3 genre where you slide entire rows and columns to align sacred hieroglyphs and trigger ancient magic.

title: Block Color Puzzle Blast
description: Immerse yourself in the explosive fun of Block Color Puzzle Blast, a thrilling puzzler where strategic block placement is key. Drag and drop vibrant blocks to fill gaps, unleash combos to earn massive scores, and experience the satisfying blast as completed lines clear the board, challenging you to reach new heights in colorful puzzle mastery.

title: Goods Triple Match 3D
description: Begin a super satisfying match 3 puzzle challenge. Goods Triple Match 3D is a colorful and addictive casual logic game where all items appear in beautiful and realistic 3D. Your table is filled with tons of cute 3D drinks.

title: Spider Solitaire
description: Spider Solitaire is a timeless card puzzle where strategy and precision lead to victory. Arrange cards in descending order from King to Ace within the same suit to clear the tableau.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Brainrot Click to Hatch
description: Enter Brainrot Click to Hatch, the most absurd and epic clicker at the same time. With every tap you release BRAINROTS, each one stranger and more chaotic than the last. Accumulate energy, unlock upgrades, and watch how the BRAINROTS evolve into impossible forms. From viral classics to MAX POWER versions, the challenge is clear: collect them all before losing your mind. Do you think you can dominate the Brainrot universe with just a click?

title: Join Clash Color Button
description: Are you ready for a game of choices and surprises? Color Button is the game for you! You need to pick the right door and make it to the end safely. But be careful, each door can lead to a different challenge or enemy. You have to use your skills and strategies to avoid traps and obstacles. Teamwork is the key to success in this game. Color Button is an exciting game that tests your judgment and decision-making skills. Do you have what it takes to beat the enemies and reach the end?

title: Open House
description: Open House is a puzzle match-3 game where you're unexpectedly tasked with turning an abandoned residence into your dream home via one puzzle at a time. Each puzzle brings about new furnishings and upgrades to keep you hooked.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Hide & Seek Go And Find
description: Enjoy the classic game of Hide & Seek in a whole new way with 'Hide & Seek - Family Edition'! Play offline with up to five characters: mother, father, child, police, and thief, each with their unique role. Fathers seek their children, mothers search diligently, children hunt for hidden chocolates, police track down thieves, and thieves sneakily collect treasures.

title: Juicy Match
description: Tired of candies? Dive into Juicy Match and explore a world of natural, fresh, and juicy delights! You run the best Juice Bar in town, where you match a variety of fruits, from tropical to classic, to create the perfect juice blends. Your cheerful friend, Tiki will guide you with tips and tricks. Match three or more identical fruits to juice them and complete levels. Create chain reactions for extra bonuses and points. Enjoy a refreshing, juicy adventure with Juicy Match!

title: Emergency Operator
description: In Emergency Operator, you take charge of urgent 911 calls. Understand the caller's situation and decide whether to send the fire crew, police, medical team — or if no help is needed at all. Make the right calls to save lives, avoid false alarms, and keep the city safe. Prove your skills with accurate decisions and get promoted to higher ranks. Every decision counts!

title: Ladder Master - Color Run
description:
Run and collect ladder parts, grow your ladder, reach the moon!
Fun and addictive runner game for one player!
Can you make the highest ladder? Check out now!

title: Drop Bricks Breaker
description: Drop Bricks Breaker is an interesting casual puzzle game. You can relax yourself during play time. You only need to tap the screen to aim the bricks, then launch the ball. Isn't easy it? Come to try it now! Have a great time!

title: Magic Finger Puzzle 3d
description:
Magic Finger Puzzle 3D is an interesting casual puzzle online game. You have an amazing pair of  hands that can fire the laser. It can help you smash the cages that are holding you. It can also
  launch boxes onto barricades so that you can escape from the cage without stepping on spikes and dying. But don't worry, you need to use your ingenuity to make good use of those amazing hands. All difficulties will be solved. Join the game if you want to try a journey full of adventure.

title: Color Dash
description: Color Dash is a fast-paced endless runner that tests your reflexes and color matching skill! Pilot a speeding rocket and match its color to smash through colored gates. Dodge the wrong colors and react to frantic color changes to keep your run alive. Grab powerful shield and nitro power-ups to blast further and beat your personal best score in this addictive arcade adventure. How high can you score?

title: Brainrot Evolution
description: Welcome to the world of meme Italian animals - a dynamic arcade game where you control unique creatures, destroy the environment, gather resources, and unlock new animals. Your goal is to evolve and progress further, unlocking more and more unusual meme beasts. Help yourself with pets: each one provides advantages and strengthens your character. Explore levels, destroy objects, collect useful resources, and unlock the next stage of evolution.

title: Stickman Jailbreak Story
description:
An exciting puzzle game in which the player will have to help stick make a daring escape from prison. Stick found himself in a sinister prison, from which there is no way out, except for various ingenious paths, hidden objects and puzzles.
The player will explore the various rooms of the prison, paying attention to every small detail and examining objects in search of key clues. Each room is filled with riddles, traps and various items that can be used to escape.

title: Strategy of war. Tanks and helicopters.
description:
"Strategy of war" is an exciting strategy war game where the player has to control squads of tanks and helicopters, develop his base, choose battle tactics and fight the enemy.

The game offers a wide range of equipment and weapons, a variety of missions and tasks, as well as the opportunity to improve and develop their forces. It is important to properly allocate resources, as well as use tactical techniques to defeat the enemy.

title: Hide And Seek Blue Monster
description: Enter a world full of mystery and fun. In Hide And Seek: Blue Monster, you will experience a unique hide-and-seek adventure. The game combines casual games with puzzle challenges. You should keep running away to prevent being caught by the blue monster, and when the blue monster is staring at you, hold stop in front of the fruit, in front of the coke, or front of the water glass, etc.

title: Puzzle Lab
description: Tap connected blocks to clear them! If any blocks are left, you will lose life. The game ends when your life reaches 0. You can use placed special bombs by tapping them.

title: Dino Ranch
description:
JON & BLITZ - IT’S VELOCI-TIME!
• Throwing the lasso to the escaped compies
• Dodging herds of ankylosaurus.
• Finding the naughty compies.
• Feeding Angus.
• Flying and dodging objects with Pteddy
• Moving the dinosaurs to the stable.
• Challenging the Trihorn Raptor to a race.
• Helping the compies to jump across the river.

title: Cloak Master Shooter Run
description: Cloak Master-Shooter Run allows you to show your shooting and running skills in an exciting environment! In this casual game, you will be transformed into a mysterious hero. Navigate through different scenarios, avoid obstacles and complete challenges.

title: Portals
description: Portals - HTML5 adventure-puzzle game where two heroes, one black and one white, are stranded on a mysterious planet filled with portals after being swallowed by a black hole. Your mission is to guide them through a series of challenging levels, utilizing their unique abilities to navigate this portal-filled world and find their way home. With intriguing puzzles, captivating graphics, and an immersive storyline, Portals offers a thrilling gaming experience for players of all ages.

title: Jigsolitaire
description: Step into a peaceful world of beautiful images made from gentle, carefully crafted blocks. Jigsolitaire is a game you’ll want to return to every day: it helps you unwind, disconnect from stress, and enjoy a small moment of calm just for yourself. Each level reveals a new scene - warm landscapes, charming cottages, delicate nature details, and quiet corners you’ll love exploring piece by piece.

title: SquidGame.io
description: Engage in free multiplayer survival! Compete in 7-minute minigames against 30 rivals. Based on the hit Netflix show, test your skills and strategy. Fail a challenge, get eliminated by Pink Soldiers! Adapt and outmaneuver to survive. Will you be the last one standing?

title: Merge 2048 Gun Rush
description: Merge 2048 Gun Rush is a pistol runner game. Combine guns of the same level to make more powerful guns. Stack as many guns as you can as a way to increase firepower. Slide to operate the guns, easy to learn and suitable for all ages. Can you win every game? Join us to give it a try! Good luck!

title: Super Stock Stack
description: Super Stock Stack challenges you to sort food cans onto shelves with speed and clever organization! Match the cans by their labels, manage the growing stock, and test your skills as the levels get tougher. Can you become the ultimate stock master?

title: GT Championship Arcade
description: Get ready to ignite your engines and experience the ultimate rush of speed in GT Championship Arcade! This fast-paced, adrenaline-fueled racing game brings the excitement of GT racing into a visually stunning, arcade-style world filled with neon-lit tracks, intense rivalries, and heart-pounding action. Whether you’re a casual gamer looking for quick thrills or a hardcore racing fan seeking the ultimate challenge, this game offers an electrifying experience like no other.

title: Spaceflight Simulator
description: Do you have a space dream? Spaceflight Simulator is a challenging spaceflight simulation game suitable for boys who love to build and launch rockets. The game has real-life conditions in space.

title: Sandbox - Destroy the Ragdoll
description:
Ready to destroy and earn? In this sandbox clicker, it's simple: choose your weapon, attack characters, and get paid for the damage you deal. The stronger your attacks, the bigger the reward!  

Use different tactics, unlock new gear, and upgrade your firepower. The further you go, the more powerful the weapons and the greater the possibilities. Ready to become the strongest fighter? Then tap, destroy, and earn!

title: Solitaire Story TriPeaks 5
description: The highly anticipated 5th installation of one of the most popular Solitaire Card Games of all time! Foxy, the game’s cute little character, will take you on a journey to new destinations, visiting distant countries, fantastic landscapes, and famous landmarks.

title: Love Cats Rope
description: Help pretty woolen cats to be together! Think carefully before you draw a figure that will help to meet two loving hearts!

title: Among Squid Challenge Online
description: All players, get ready. They are hiding in a maze. To win the game, you must defeat all the other players. You have a knife and must defeat everyone. Catch the players one by one and make sure they are eliminated. Don’t worry, they won’t find you. If they try to find you, hide in the ventilation holes. Defeat all the players. Be careful, and whatever you do, don't reveal yourself. If they catch you, you will lose and they will defeat you.

title: Turbo Stunt Racing
description: Experience high-speed thrills in Turbo Stunt Racing! Perform epic stunts, race fierce rivals, and upgrade unique cars in this 3D arcade racer packed with action, traps, and ramps. Master precision driving and dominate every level!

title: Lost Puppy Rescue and Care
description: Welcome to Lost Puppy Rescue and Care. A small pup is lost in the rain, cold and alone. He’s not sure who to trust—but with your care, that starts to change. Gently clean him up, feed him, and help him feel safe again. This calm, story-like game is all about kindness, connection, and giving one little dog a second chance.

title: Physics Balls
description: Physics Balls is a creative and challenging math and physics puzzle game. Here has numbers and ball elements. Improve your logical thinking and hands-on skills while having fun. Your aim is to break all bricks in one shoot. Throw balls to make them roll among the bricks. You can apply physical principles to control the balls cleverly.

title: Pursuit Rampage
description: In Pursuit Rampage, you’re behind the wheel of a police car in an endless, high-speed chase. Navigate through busy streets, dodge obstacles, and close in on criminals while keeping your cool under pressure. The game constantly pushes your reflexes to the limit, with each second offering a new challenge. Whether you're weaving through traffic or speeding down back alleys, the action never lets up.

title: MX Offroad Master
description: MX Offroad Master is a driving bike game where you cycle down steep mountain slopes. Hop on any of the four mountain bikes and get ready for high-octane stunts.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Fashionista Christmas Eve Party
description: Indulge in the Fashionista Christmas Eve Party extravaganza! Discover glamorous holiday ensembles, festive accessories, and the perfect blend of chic for a stylish celebration. Join the fashion-forward festivities and elevate your Christmas Eve style to new heights. Unwrap the magic of the season with Fashionista, where every outfit is a statement and every moment is a fashion triumph. Let the glamour of Christmas Eve unfold.

title: Labuba Halloween Infestation
description: Monsters are invading Halloween! You must destroy them all — the fate of Halloween is in your hands. The game features three different modes, each with tougher and more powerful monsters.

title: Capybara Skewer Match
description:
Capybara Skewer Match
Step into the cozy world of Capybara, your friendly skewer merchant! Help Capybara clear out the skewers by grilling and matching them before time runs out.

Capybara needs your help to keep the BBQ stand running. Can you master the grill, match all the skewers, unlock tasty collectibles, and make Capybara proud?

title: Merge 3D - Match 3 Balloons
description: Your goal is to help the house, floating in the sky on a variety of colorful balloons of different shapes, to land on the ground. Clicking on the balls, you move them to the cells at the bottom of the screen. Collect three identical ball objects in a row to make them disappear, freeing up space and bringing the house closer to the ground. Grandpa is sitting on the roof, and when the house finally lands, he will be happy to celebrate the victory!

title: Commando Force 2
description: Get ready for a gun games adventure with Commando Force 2! Jump into a fast-paced shooter! Join the fun and dive into the action! Unlock new weapons, dominate the maps, and show everyone what you’ve got!

title: Horror School Detective Story
description: Ready to enter a horror school full of scares and mysteries? In Horror School: Detective Story, you’ll play the role of a brave detective. Solve the mysteries layered on top of each other at the school. Each scene is tense and exciting, full of suspense and the unknown! Choose the complexity of the scenario to start your challenge.

title: Miracle Mahjong
description: The panda has a challenge for you. You will face five tests on your way to the top. Attempt to finish all stages and earn the honor of being a Mahjong master.

title: Crazy Bubble Breaker
description: Crazy Bubble Breaker is a fun and challenging 2D bubble shooter physics puzzle game. You have to destroy all bubbles with falling balls. You can aim the bubble with a subline and release the ball. You can also bounce the ball off the walls to hit more bubbles with one ball. Can you eliminate them? Dozens of levels are waiting for you to challenge! Use your brain and try to finish all levels with the fewest balls!

title: Stickman Choosing actions
description: The Stickman character was kidnapped by a creature and locked up in prison. Your task is to escape from prison. Use an item selection or action. What should I choose? Left or right? It's up to you.

title: Emoji Challenge
description: Emoji Challenge is an engaging skill game. Featuring levels constructed entirely with popular emojis. The game offers six distinct puzzle types: link puzzle, memory puzzle, word quiz, related puzzle, shadow puzzle, and crop puzzle. This game is perfect for players who enjoy brain teasers and want to test their problem-solving skills.

title: Frost Defense
description:
❄️ Embark on a thrilling journey through a frozen wilderness in Frost Defense, a strategic tower defense game that puts your tactical skills to the test! ??

In this action-packed adventure, you'll take on the role of a lone survivor ?‍♂️ battling against the relentless onslaught of arctic creatures ??‍❄️?.
The enemy is merciless — only your ingenuity and strategic prowess can keep you alive in this harsh frozen world. ⚔️?️

title: Color Dodge
description:
Color Dodge is a fast-paced, addictive color-matching arcade game where reflexes and precision are your only hope!

Control a glowing circle and survive as colorful walls charge toward you from all directions. Here's the twist — you must collide only with the wall segment that matches your color, or you explode in a juicy blast!

Whether you're chasing high scores or just vibing with neon chaos, Color Dodge delivers bite-sized action with a splash of style.

title: Word Connect Puzzle
description: Word Connect Puzzle is a relaxing yet brain-boosting word game. Swipe letters to form hidden words, unlock new packs, and watch the difficulty rise as your vocabulary grows. Earn stars, complete daily challenges, and use hints when you’re stuck. Play offline anytime, enjoy clean visuals and smooth controls, and chase streak bonuses for higher scores. Perfect for quick sessions or long puzzle runs—smart, simple, and satisfying for all ages.

title: DIY Makeup Salon - SPA Makeover Studio
description:
Have you ever dreamt of becoming a fashionable DIY make-up stylist in the beauty makeup artist’s salon?

Welcome to the DIY Makeup Salon: SPA Makeover- a fascinating beauty salon game, where you can create fun-filled makeovers for pretty girls! You can showcase your skills as a make-up stylist in our salon. Make use of various tools and facial cleansers to give your model a refreshing skin makeover. There are numerous dress up designs to explore for a flawless make up look!

title: Shape Transform Race
description: Shape Transform Race is a fun racing game that can be played in reaction-based 1 and 2 player game modes. You can play the game against bots or against your friend. Always be the fastest by choosing the right vehicle for the terrain! You can unlock new vehicles and characters with the coins you earn from the races.

title: Eastern Star vs City Style Icon
description: Welcome to the world of style, where the ancient palaces of the East meet the splendor of a modern metropolis! Two beautiful heroines are waiting for you in the game: an oriental beauty with exquisite outfits in the style of an Ottoman fairy tale and a stylish urban fashionista conquering the catwalks of the metropolis. During the game, you will become a fashion stylist and create unique looks for each of the girls. Choose your side in the cultural dispute and make this choice a reality!

title: Happy Town
description:
In Happy Town you have to lead your own city and make its inhabitants happy!

Becoming the mayor of your happy city is very simple! Combine items, upgrade buildings, complete tasks for residents, communicate with them, expand and enjoy a vibrant style and soundtrack. Residents are waiting for you!

title: Merge Combo
description: Immerse yourself in this captivating merge puzzle game! Combine matching blocks to score points and trigger epic combos. The more blocks you merge, the bigger the numbers and combos grow! Test your strategy and aim for the highest score—how large a number can you create?

title: Mr Reckless: Car Chase Simulator
description:
Run fast, crash hard, and cheat death — in style.

Race through a chaotic low-poly city as you dodge police, traffic, and total destruction. Use game-changing power-ups like Slow-Mo, Freeze, Nitro to escape the impossible.

One rule: don’t stop. How long can you stay free?

title: Snowboard Game​ Party
description: Begin snow racing thrill in Snowboard Game Party. It's a high-energy multiplayer ski sport challenge. In this adrenaline-filled winter sports game, you’ll join other players on dynamic ski tracks full of surprises. Flexibly control your hero and race against other opponents. While keeping your speed! Avoid snowballs, fences, sudden slopes, etc. Win races to earn points, unlock gear, and customize your style!

title: Celebrity Aesthetic Challenge
description: Celebrity Aesthetic Challenge lets you explore a range of unique celebrity-inspired styles! Compete in fun fashion challenges as you mix and match outfits, accessories, and hairstyles to recreate iconic looks. From E-girl and Soft-girl vibes to edgy streetwear and glam red carpet ensembles, showcase your creativity and win the ultimate fashion battle. Can you rise to the challenge and become the trendsetting fashion icon? Let the style showdown begin!

title: Pixel Journey
description: The “Pixel Journey” will appeal to all fans of exploration, collecting resources in a cozy pixel world. It combines a cozy atmosphere and addictive gameplay. Reach the end and find out all the secrets! Support us by leaving a review and comment! If you have any comments or suggestions, please describe them and we will try to make improvements quickly!

title: Graffiti Tags: spray painting
description:
Become a graffiti master in our simulator! Realistic physics, a wide range of colors and surfaces. Draw on the walls, avoid the police and create unique masterpieces of street art.

Your path will not be easy — the police will pursue you at every step. But if you avoid them, your works can become a real cultural heritage! Get inspired, develop your skills, experiment with colors and fonts to create unforgettable graffiti.

title: Mansion Tale: Merge Secrets
description: Discover Mansion Tale: Merge Secrets, your ultimate casual puzzle adventure. Dive into exciting merge gameplay combined with home renovation challenges as you uncover mysteries and restore a grand estate.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: OMG Word Rainbow
description: Step into the vibrant world of OMG Word Rainbow, an engaging word finder game illuminated by the beauty of the rainbow. Explore a colorful mosaic of letter tiles, where drawing lines along neighboring letters unveils words inspired by the enchanting spectrum of colors; enhance your journey with rewarded ads, allowing players to effortlessly skip levels in this captivating linguistic adventure.

title: Car Park Simulator
description: Welcome to Car Park Simulator, Are you ready to test your driving skills and master the art of parking? Navigate through 72 challenging levels filled with obstacles and narrow spaces...

title: Basketball Rush
description: This isn’t just about shooting — it's about precision, patience and strategy. As you score, the game intensifies, but with helpful power-ups at your disposal, you’ll be ready for anything. Unlock a variety of unique ball skins to customize your game and add even more excitement.

title: Soccer Duel
description: An exciting game in the style of table football, which you can play both alone and with friends on the same device or over the network.

title: Prinxy Winterella
description: If you're still seeking inspiration for your upcoming winter ball, then look no further Our social media influencers bring a selection of jaw-dropping makeup looks that are going to help you steal the spotlights during the most glamorous night of the year. In the Prinxy Winterella game for girls, you can discover the secrets of a sophisticated fantasy makeup look in icy cold colors. Play today and have fun!

title: Donut Run
description: This thrilling arcade game is designed for adventure enthusiasts and fans of active gameplay. Step into the role of a fearless rolling character, racing through dynamic levels filled with vibrant settings and exhilarating obstacles. With easy-to-master controls, you’ll quickly dive into the action, experiencing a blend of tension and adrenaline. Each level features diverse obstacles and traps, ensuring every run feels fresh and exciting.

title: WorldGuessr Free GeoGuessr
description: Worldguessr is a casual quiz game, a free alternative to Geoguessr, perfect for testing and expanding your geography skills through immersive Street View exploration. Each round, you will find yourself dropped into random locations around the globe, with only environmental clues to guide you in pinpointing your exact whereabouts.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: That's Not My Neighbor
description: That's Not My Neighbor is a detective puzzle game. You are going to be the new janitor in this building when you are watching the tutorial video. Your job is to determine if the person who wants to enter the building is a monster. The monsters can transform into anyone and imitate them. Some monsters are not good at imitation and may develop flaws. You have no choice but to pay attention to the image of your neighbors. At the same time, remember to fill out checklists for each neighbor.

title: Divinex
description:
Embark on a captivating journey into the world of Divinex! Solve challenging puzzles by matching pairs of themed tiles adorned with intricate symbols! Сhallenge yourself with increasingly difficult levels, create a unique atmosphere by choosing new avatars and backgrounds. Immerse yourself in the magical world of Divinex - a new relaxing game with stunning visuals - explore all levels and uncover the magic hidden within the tiles!
Begin your journey today with Divinex!

title: Moto X3M Dead Ahead
description: Racing game enthusiasts, are you ready? This is a game that's going to make your adrenaline skyrocket - Moto X3M Dead Ahead! It's an exciting blend of motor, driving, and even a bit of shooting. Driving a cool motorcycle, take your partner with you and race through tricky tracks.The game offers thrilling driving action as you avoid obstacles like wrecked cars, fallen debris, and explosive traps.

title: Merge Magnat - IDeaL Store
description: Welcome to the world of trade, where you can create your own shopping district! In this engaging game, you will build the area by placing various shops and attracting customers who will spend money. Merge similar shops to create higher-level versions that yield more profit. Watch as customers pass by your stores, leaving money while you relax and enjoy the game.

title: Tobinin
description: Step into the mind-bending world of Tobinin, a fast-paced puzzle-action platformer where every move alters reality! Collect orbs to switch platforms and navigate through a world that constantly shifts beneath your feet. Can you master the art of controlled chaos and reach the goal?

title: Ragdoll Bounce
description: Jump into a fun 2D challenge where you control a ragdoll launched by a bigger ragdoll. Click to bounce on platforms and keep climbing. But be careful—missing a platform means a big fall!

title: Fishing Life
description: Fishing Life—a relaxing clicker game with 2D cartoon visuals. Choose your target fish, click the water to reel it in, and manage its energy. Prioritize upgrading Strength first. Skins enhance tap strength, outfits boost damage, and Keepnet nets extra prices. Assistants increase Income, Strength, Damage, and Price. Open chests and claim cash from charged drift bottles. Luck might grant you treasure chests—open them for valuable assistants!

title: Fragen
description: Fragen is an intense shooting FPS game where you face adrenaline-filled battles on your own or in a team. Whether you choose free-for-all or team deathmatch, your goal is to survive and dominate.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Draw Climb Race - The Ultimate Hill Climbing Challenge
description: In Draw Climb Race, you draw shapes to climb hills! Any drawing you make will help you climb up steep hills and tricky paths. If you get stuck, just draw a new shape to keep going. Have fun and test your skills in this easy-to-play, addictive game!

title: Cookie Land
description: Step into Cookie Land, the ultimate sweet Match 3 adventure! Match cookies, candies, pies, donuts, cupcakes, and cotton candies to clear the board and trigger scrumptious chain reactions. Explore a fairytale-like saga map filled with colorful sweets, charming graphics, and a catchy soundtrack. With new treats raining down and endless levels of fun, Cookie Land is the most addictive, mouth-watering Match 3 game for all sweet lovers!

title: Beat Blader 3D
description: Immerse yourself in the ultimate rhythm experience with Beat Blader 3D, where music meets action! Slash your way through vibrant, futuristic landscapes in sync with the beat of your favorite songs. Armed with dual energy blades, you’ll slice through incoming obstacles, hitting targets in perfect harmony with the rhythm, all while dodging challenges that appear in time with the music.

title: sokoban puzzle game
description: Push the Box game is an addictive and challenging puzzle game. It will help you train your brain. The operation of the game is very simple, move the box pusher by using the four direction buttons: up, down, left and right, push all the boxes to the specified position, the game is considered successful. If you are a fan of matching puzzle games, you will love our game. Keep your brain sharp while relaxing, having fun and relieving stress. Come and enjoy playing this puzzle game!

title: Brainrot Cleaning
description: Welcome to Brainrot Cleaning, the weirdly satisfying cleaning simulation that turns chaos into calm. In this fun and quirky casual game, your job is to scrub away the mess caused by the wild world of brainrot characters and their hilarious antics! In the Cleaning Italian Brainrot or the Underwater mode, you will finish various cleaning tasks.

title: GT Cars Mega Ramps
description: Exotic cars, mega ramps, colorful giant bosses and face to face races all come together in this game. GT Cars Mega Ramps invites you to a fantastic driving experience with its completely unique game-play. Fly over mega ramps with your customized exotic car, destroy giant bosses or try to finish the stages first in face to face races!

title: Escape From Tung Tung Sahur
description: Escape From Tung Tung Sahur is a fast-paced runner-platformer where quick reflexes are your only chance of survival! You play as a lone runner escaping the bizarre and relentless anomaly known as Tung Tung Sahur. Sprint across platforms, leap over deadly gaps, and avoid sudden obstacles. With intuitive one-touch controls, the game is easy to play but challenging to master. Each level introduces new platform layouts and jump timing that push your skills to the limit.

title: Idle Restaurant Tycoon
description: Do you want to be a unique restaurant manager? You can learn how to be a manager with the Idle Restaurant game. You may need some experts for cooking and serving. Hire a master chef, develop your staff, manage your finances and become the perfect boss. Also, dont forget to check your market for surprise gifts. You can play Idle Restaurant Tycoon in a simple way without the need to constantly click.

title: Merge Fruit
description: Looking for something fun, relaxing, and totally addictive? You just found it. Merge Fruit is a simple but surprisingly strategic puzzle game where you combine fruits to create even bigger ones. It’s a satisfying blend of logic, timing, and casual fun that’s perfect for any moment.

title: Fish Story 4
description: Fish Story 4 returns with its biggest underwater Match-3 adventure yet! Dive into over 4,500+ colorful levels packed with fun challenges, clever puzzles, and sparkling ocean treasures. Join your friend Mermaid on Daily Missions to earn coins, boosters, and special rewards every time you play. Take part in exciting Treasure Hunt events and uncover hidden pirate loot beneath the waves. Relax, match, and explore the deep blue sea!

title: Crazy Tunnel
description: Crazy Tunnel is a fast-paced, first-person arcade game. Navigate through the tunnel at breakneck speeds and aim for the longest distance possible.

title: Bubble Shooter Butterfly
description:
Bubble Shooter Butterfly is your next favorite bubble shooter game! It is a classic arcade game with a fresh look and new twists. With its bright butterflies and breezy gameplay this online butterfly game is perfect for Spring and Summer.

The game includes 300 diverse levels, divided over beautifully serene day and night backgrounds. Release all the butterflies and achieve the highest scores!

title: Piggy Clicker
description: Piggy Clicker is a classic Clicker game, where you get to have Piggy as your pet and trough clicking buy him toys and such

title: Bubble Shooter Hawaii
description: Bubble Shooter Hawaii is a bubble shooter game with a hawaii theme and classic gameplay combined with special bubble mechanics. It's unique level map will guide you to the challenging levels with unique bubbles like the horizontal row destroyer, the rocks or the hidden bubbles.

title: Bubble Shooter Panda Blast
description:
Step into the colorful world of Panda Blast, where your mission is to rescue baby pandas by popping bubbles. Mama Panda needs your help to bring her lost cubs home. With vibrant graphics, charming animations, and exciting puzzles, this game is perfect for all ages.
Match three or more bubbles to clear them, free trapped pandas, and progress through hundreds of fun levels. Use powerful boosters, enjoy daily rewards, and experience smooth animations that bring the adventure to life.

title: Master Blender
description: Becoming the Strongest Bartending Master！Tap the bottle lightly to pour water. Organize the water so that each bottle's water is distributed to the corresponding colored cup!

title: Back 2 School Makeover
description: Embrace the nostalgia and dive into our Back 2 School Makeover game, where you can fashionably express yourself, experiment with stunning looks, and relish into the feeling of heading back to school with style! Embark on a fabulous journey with our character, Amelia, as she transforms from an edgy e-girl to a chic, school-ready fashionista. Revamp her entire look starting with a haircare routine and a new haircut, a complete skincare routine, and a new, school makeup.

title: Romantic Match Tactics
description: Romantic Match Tactics" invites you into a charming world where love meets strategy. Immerse yourself in an enchanting puzzle adventure as you strategically clear the grid, saving moves, and mastering the key to success – a delicate balance between item movement and unlocking the locked items. Progress through 48 levels, each unveiling new challenges as you align romantic trios to triumph.

title: Ramp Car VS Police: CHASE
description: Experience a dangerous police chase as you drive a ramp car or a wedge truck through chaotic traffic.Game ModesChase: Start with a wanted level of 1 and cause as much chaos as possible.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Hunter Underwater Spearfishing
description: Hunter Underwater Spearfishing is an immersive simulator hunting game that takes you deep beneath the ocean for an exciting underwater adventure. Grab your spearfishing arrow, dive in, and experience the thrill of becoming a true underwater hunter!

title: Headless Joe
description: While playing, robot Joe literally lost his head. But it's not as hopeless as it seems. To get it back in place and screw it tightly, Joe needs to solve puzzles and collect all the bolts. But he can’t do this without your help!

title: Mad Dash
description: Mad Dash is a free puzzle platform game.  You are a minotaur trapped in one of the last mazes in the galaxy: a maze of levels. You'll have to jump and dash over treacherous obstacles and challenges to make it through this maze. Many of the platforms are too far apart for you to make it with a simple jump. That is why the mad dash was created. The mad dash happens when players need to jump over spikes or a crevasse that their normal jump wouldn't traverse.

title: Kitchen Sorting
description: Kitchen Sorting uses well known meachanics of ball and water sorting games. Sort cooking ingredients into glass jars right in your comfortable kitchen. When sorted, pour them into the pot a cook meals.

title: Triple Sort 3D Home Design
description: Welcome to the world of Triple Sort 3D: Home Design, where matching meets decorating! Dive in the puzzle-solving with and begin crafting a virtual space of your dreams. Get ready to transform ugly and cluttered rooms  into clean and cozy spaces! Discover the perfect blend of challenges, creativity, and an epic makeover journey that awaits you!

title: Zombies and Guns
description:
Urgently save: the evil spirits are coming!
You are a Fighter, who is attacked by hordes of zombies and all sorts of evil spirits! Don't let them eat you alive!

title: Athena Match 2
description: Athena Match 2 - the epic sequel returns! Join the goddess Athena on a new mythical journey through ancient Greece. Match 3 or more legendary artifacts to restore temples and unlock the secrets of the gods. Enjoy stunning visuals, immersive sound, and hundreds of new levels packed with daily missions and challenges. Step into the world of Greek mythology and prove your match-3 skills in this divine adventure!

title: Nuts Puzzle: Sort By Color
description: Nuts Puzzle: Sort by Color is a classic puzzle game where you sort various colored nuts onto screws until they are all the same color. As you progress through the levels, the puzzles get trickier, requiring you to plan your moves carefully and think several steps ahead.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Tap Car
description:
Unveil stunning car masterpieces by solving image puzzles. Every tap reveals more of the picture—can you uncover them all? A must-play for car enthusiasts and puzzle lovers alike!

Would you like a few more variations depending on the tone you're aiming for (like more casual, exciting, or elegant)?

title: Kids Coloring
description: Children adore entertaining coloring activities, and this Coloring Game stands out as one of the finest free coloring books and painting apps designed for kids!

title: Fish Feeding
description: Nobody can stop you, but you are not the only fish in the sea: you will have to avoid the vicious sharks that wander in the deepest, darkest depths, looking for a nice little fish to eat! See how high you can score!

title: Sniper Shot Secret Mission
description:
Sniper Shot Secret Mission is a game of nerves and skills. Each time you start the new level, a challenge is waiting for you to solve. Never fire on the wrong target otherwise their no second chance as a sniper. 
As a sniper you need to work silently once you shoot the bullet everyone will be aware of the situation and you might loose your target. You can be targeted through security guards once you shoot at your high profile targets.

title: World Solitaire -Tripeaks-
description:
It is TriPeaks, one of the most famous solitaires in the world.
Take a step to go up and test your brain and luck
How far can I clean it?

title: Challenger City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Indygirl and the Golden Skull
description:
The girl 
who loves to uncover hidden treasures and adventures. She now found the 
Golden Skull and now ready come and needs your help dig into the cave! Your 
task is help Indygirl in her journey to collect all the jewels and golds that are 
hidden in the cave. Focus on getting gold! Run as fast as 
you can before that gigantic rock will run over you!

title: Burger Empire
description:
Welcome to Burger & Beans Cafe, the ultimate restaurant-management game where you cook juicy burgers, brew the perfect coffee, and build the eatery of your dreams!

• Serve Delicious Orders: Flip patties and pour lattes for hungry customers—fast!
• Earn & Upgrade: Collect coins to unlock chic new tables, comfy booths, and vibrant dining areas.
• Customize Your Space: Choose décor, layout, and special menu items to keep guests coming back.

title: Celebrities Get Ready For Christmas
description: Step into the world of ‘Celebrities Get Ready for Christmas’! Join your favorite stars as they prepare for the festive season. Explore dazzling holiday outfits, glamorous decorations, and witness the magic of Christmas through the eyes of celebrities. Get ready for a star-studded holiday celebration! Play and have fun!

title: Draw War
description: Unleash your creativity in Draw War. This is a wonderful strategy game. Here drawing meets battles. Build a hero lineup, draw your legions, then unleash the power of your army. The numbers show the soldiers summoned. Click to send Shielded Soldiers, Soldiers on Horseback, or Super Beasts.

title: Pick Brainrot: 3D Battle
description: Choose one of two Brainrots, transform into them, and engage in intense battles with other players. Defeat opponents and unlock new abilities: a Brainrot morph, unique weapons, and powerful abilities. Every battle is a chance to prove yourself! At level 5, you'll unlock a protective shield, and at level 10, you'll unlock slow-motion , which will give you a huge advantage in battle. Earn titles for your victories, from "Noob" to a true "Pro"!

title: Idle Baseball Tycoon
description: Play Idle Baseball Tycoon free online and step into a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Build your dream team, upgrade stadiums, recruit players, and grow profits in a smart manager sim that blends idle strategy with brain game decision-making. This unblocked game runs smoothly at school or home and is fully mobile-friendly, working perfectly on desktop and mobile. It’s a free online game made for quick breaks and long-term domination.

title: Ropeway Master
description:
Ropeway Master is a new challenging puzzle game. You should utilize the rope to free everyone,control the rope, overcome the obstacles, and complete the demanding and unique puzzle game. The
game is not difficult! Drag the rope to make a safe path, control the rope, and rescue everyone.Don't forget to avoid the obstacles along the way. If you play Rope Puzzle, make sure you do nothing. You will play for hours and linger.

title: Italian Brainrot Quiz
description: Italian Brainrot Quiz is a chaotic meme-guessing game where you match bizarre names to iconic brainrot characters! From Tralalero Tralala to Bombardiro Crocodilo and Tung Tung Tung Sahur – can you guess them all? Each round is a wild ride through surreal Italian meme culture. Laugh, confuse your friends, and become the ultimate Brainrot Champion. Spaghetti logic guaranteed. Ready to play?

title: Mahjong Garden
description:
Mahjong Garden offers players the opportunity to enjoy a classic puzzle game with no time limits and on full screen!
In this exciting game you have to connect identical chips in a certain sequence so that they disappear from the field, as well as immerse yourself in oriental culture!
Unlock new tiles and backgrounds to take a look Mahjong in a new way!
Raise your level of logic and visualization, making every move strategic!

title: Energy Factory Idle
description: Energy Factory Idle is a relaxing idle factory game where you build and upgrade your own energy production system. Start with a small generator and turn it into a powerful factory by hiring workers, improving speed and output, and unlocking new generators. Your factory keeps working even while offline, letting you collect rewards and grow step by step. Simple controls, smooth progression, and a calm idle tycoon experience—perfect for short or long play sessions.

title: Save Baby Capybaras - Pull Pin
description:
“Save Baby Capybaras - Pull Pin” is a cute puzzle game where you must figure out which pins to pull in order to rescue the baby capybaras and bring them to their father capybara. Be strategic, as some pins don’t need to be pulled, while others can disrupt your game. Unlock character skins using the rubies you earn and challenge yourself across various levels!
Enjoy the game and raise your name on the global leaderboard!

title: Cute Sheep SkyBlock
description: Two cute sheep must jump from island to island in the sky to escape from the farmers and reach the portal. They need to work together as a team to overcome obstacles. You must help them. Be careful of the obstacles that fall from the ground and sky. The farmers are looking for you, and they want to catch you, so jump over them to escape. If the path is clear, eat all the hay you find. Gather all the hay and safely reach the portal.

title: Office Knight 3D: Castle Defense
description:
Office Warrior: Wield swords and axes as skillfully as a stapler!
Action Battles: Fight various enemies in dynamic 3D environments.
Progression System: Level up, improve health and damage right in the heat of battle.
Weapon & Upgrade Shop: Collect coins to buy hero upgrades and equip yourself.
Endless Challenge: Deflect waves of enemies and prove you are the ultimate defender!

title: Mega Lamba Ramp
description: Crazy car stunts and stunt car racing games that will give you the most thrilling experience. Perform dangerous stunts on impossible tracks in our racing and stunt simulator. Perform stunts on all the cars for your favorite characters to move to the next level!

title: Impostor among us: Escape from prison
description:
The traitor ended up in a space prison. But the impostor does not plan to stay there for long. You play as an impostor who must go through all the traps, solve puzzles and kill all the enemies on the level. Once the imposter has neutralized all the amogus, he will be able to break out of prison. But the evil among will not let you go into space so easily.

- 100+ varied and colorful levels.
- To kill the enemy you need to approach him.
- Logic tasks and puzzles!
- Boss battles!

title: Burger Cafe - Cooking Games For Kids
description: Learn to cook burgers and open your own restaurant! Choose a recipe, gather fresh ingredients, chop veggies, prepare signature sauces, bake buns to perfection, and fry juicy patties. Once everything’s ready, assemble your burger masterpiece, package it, and serve happy customers. Customize your restaurant’s look and unlock new recipes as you rise to become a top chef in town. Dive into the burger-making experience and build the best burger joint around!

title: Number Master
description:
A number elimination game, connect two numbers that are the same or add up to 10, eliminate them!Relax and match in a peaceful bamboo forest. 

If you enjoy logic puzzles like Sudoku, Merge Numbers, Ten Match, or CrossMath, Panda Match Ten is your perfect nature escape. Train your brain, improve your memory, and boost logic—all with the charm of adorable pandas and soothing bamboo forests.

title: Tropical Match
description: Embark on a vibrant adventure in Tropical Match 3! Help Coco, your lively island guide, find fruits and other island gems in a tropical paradise. Match exotic fruits, uncover vibrant flowers and observe colourful exotic birds while enjoying the island adventure. The game features exciting levels and a relaxing island soundtrack! So what are you waiting for? Enjoy the tropical paradise adventure now!

title: PolyTrack
description: PolyTrack is a classic car racing game with a slight twist. You race a car you've customized, on a track you might have designed yourself.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Sprunki Garden
description: Welcome to Sprunki Garden – a wild match-3 puzzle adventure inspired by the legendary Sprunki meme! Match colorful Sprunki characters across 100 hilarious levels filled with chaos, charm, and absurdity. Every move connects you with the bizarre Sprunki universe, where each character is weirder than the last. Get ready to swipe, match, and laugh your way through the most brainrotted garden ever!

title: Italian Brainrot Bike Rush
description: Hop on for chaotic fun in Italian Brainrot Bike Rush, a meme-filled obby bike platformer. Pick from 5 absurd meme legends and ride through floating platforms, deadly traps, and wild jumps. Play 5 levels across 3 modes—Normal, Challenge, and One Life. Collect coins, unlock checkpoints, and conquer brainrot chaos. Perfect for fans of meme-based bike racing and Italian brainrot platformers!

title: Zen Mini Games 2
description: Zen Mini Games 2 contains many different puzzle games. For example, let all the balls fall into the empty boxes on the screen so that the balls don't fall out. The difficulty of the game increases step by step. If you want to try different puzzle games, don't miss the Zen Mini Games 2!

title: Slinger Block
description: Guide a red square through compact grid-based puzzles filled with sliding blocks and locked paths. Clear the way, collect every yellow key, unlock the yellow door, and reach the exit to win. Simple rules, clever layouts, and satisfying logic challenges make each level a fun brain teaser.

title: My Little Car Wash
description: Wash and shine with My Little Car Wash, a 2D cartoon game that lets you clean different vehicles. You don’t need any experience, just follow the hints and use the tools to make the vehicles look new. You will have 22 vehicles to choose from, each with its dirt and stains. You will also have the drivers watching you as you work, so be quick and efficient. You will earn yellow stars for each vehicle you wash. My Little Car Wash is a game that will teach you some washing skills! Have fun!

title: Backflip Master
description: Backflip Master is the most popular in sports' game. The main test of the player's mastery of backflips and skills. You need to backflip to reach the finished line. Of course, there will be some obstacles on the way, you must also flip over. So, are you ready to challenge this game now? Come on!

title: Robot Transform Race
description: Robot Transform Race is a running arcade game that is made of collecting, avoiding, and transforming elements. With 3D transformable robots, you need to win each race by collecting useful items, avoiding obstacles, and slowing down the other robots. Mostly you can strike and slow down the other robots nearby. Collect missiles to attach the advanced robots behind you. Don't forget to design your robot rather than buying a provided skin.

title: Moto Road Rash 3D 2
description: Rev up your engines and feel the thrill of the open road in Moto Road rash 3D 2! This high-octane motorcycle game immerses you in a heart-pounding racing experience where agility and precision are your best allies. Zoom through a dynamic, ever-changing cityscape, weaving between lanes, dodging traffic, and mastering daring stunts.

title: Fire Truck Driving Simulator
description: Fire Truck Driving Simulator is a fire truck driving simulation game with 4 different modes. In Level Mode, you need to arrive at the fire area and put it out in time in 10 levels. In City Mode, you have a chance to decide to accept the emergency missions on the street freely. In Free Mode, you can train your fireman knowledge without any limitations. In Parking Mode, you can forget about fire-rescue missions and train your parking skills. Enjoy your fireman time!

title: Mystic Object Hunt
description: Welcome to 'Mystic Object Hunt,' a fifteen-level Hidden Object game. Explore ancient realms, discover hidden artifacts, and unravel secrets in dim chambers and ruins. Sharpen your skills, overcome challenges, and delve into the mysteries within each location. Get ready for a thrilling hunt!

title: King Kong Chaos
description: Embark on a thrilling adventure in King Kong Chaos, a modern 2D pixel art game where players must navigate through perilous levels, dodging spiked balls and barrels hurled by a colossal gorilla. Along the way, pick up the pickaxe strategically to destroy incoming barrels and secure the coveted golden banana to progress.

title: Aim Ninja
description:
Aim Ninja is a fast-paced skill game that tests your timing and reflexes. 
Stop the moving needle at the perfect moment to score points and improve your accuracy. 
Simple to play but hard to master, Aim Ninja delivers quick, satisfying gameplay sessions 
for players of all ages.

title: Dollys Restaurant Organizing
description: This exciting game is designed to help you organize better and release your stress. You will draw inspiration and creativity of storage through [Storage Master], and pack your life comfortably and cleanly. You can organize and clean objects by category, storage location and cleaning order. This game will bring you the creative inspiration of storage, allowing you to easily apply it in real life. Similar to a jigsaw puzzle, you have to pick the right object and put it in the right place

title: Jewelry Idle
description: What is the best jewelry? Of course, those made with your own hands! Create the best jewelry store! Design stunning pieces, attract discerning customers, and watch your business thrive in this sparkling venture!

title: Farm Ring Idle
description: Farm Ring Idle is a circular farming simulation that challenges you to expand outward from a tiny central plot into a thriving, automated ring of crops. Grow vegetables, unlock smart upgrades, and deploy robotic helpers to streamline your harvest.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Zombie Survival
description: Play the nervous zombie adventure in Zombie Survival. Explore a dangerous world occupied by zombies. Collect various weapons to attack zombies. Move smartly and set traps to defend yourself from massive zombie waves. Explore abandoned cities, dark alleys, and creepy forests - each level is a new adventure! Challenge big zombie bosses and prove your survival skills under pressure! Collect many useful items to fix your broken tools.

title: Pixel Mini Golf
description:
Mini Golf is a complete game, with 400 different levels, and an addictive system. Have fun exploring the game’s green hills and plains while listening to the birds and enjoying its beautiful views, collect as many coins as possible and try to hit all the holes to achieve the highest score.

Among the game mechanics are levels with: Portals, Boxing Gloves, Cannons, Burners, Impulses, Mill, Sand, Mole Holes, Spikes and Movement Blocks that will help or hinder your game!

title: Overprotective Boyfriend
description: Imagine the beautiful Princess Marie standing in front of a mirror, looking at her reflection. Her eyes are shining, and a sly smile plays on her lips. She is ready to put on an outfit that will emphasize her grace and charm. But then her lover appears and frowns: «My dear, are you really going to wear such an open dress?» Marie knows that her faithful knight sometimes takes too much care of her, but today she intends to look dazzling!

title: 2248 Blast
description: Are you ready to train your brain while having fun? 2248 Blast is a highly addictive number-connecting puzzle game designed to relax your mind and sharpen your logic skills! With simple swipe controls and engaging gameplay, this game is perfect for puzzle lovers of all ages.

title: Vehicle Fun Race
description: Vehicle Fun Race—an exhilarating arcade game with 3D stickman characters. Collect motorcycles, cars, boats, and helicopters to reach the finish line. No need to grab vehicles; your character can handle all terrains. Dive into water? No problem—control their swim. Special helicopters await on final platforms. Ready to race? Let’s roll!

title: King of Crabs
description: Easy to operate the krab,The Shell Gallery will show each role's armor, speed, skill, and pelt,The Equipment shop sells 5 Claws, 5 Bodies, and 5 Legs, Claim extra claw coins in the Sign and Spin,The Quick Match will make a fight with 24 players.The Ultimate Guide to Winning Tactics and Tips,Find a shell first. Collect and eat fish on the ground to grow up, Attack the weaker opponents.

title: Wood Color Block
description: Step into the colorful puzzle world of Wood Color Block, where strategy and quick thinking collide. Slide vibrant blocks into place, match them with their crushers, and clear the board before time runs out. With each level, the puzzles grow more challenging, pushing your skills to the limit.

title: Stickman Team Detroit
description:
It's team time now! Cartoon character The game of Team Detroit is fun to watch. A gang of robbers is threatening the city of Detroit, but three little stick figures will come together to stop them.

Take pleasure in killing off enemy stickmen while using any of the three playable characters. Because of their unique abilities and weaponry, each playable character is tailor-made for their specific role.

title: Party Animals Cats Evolution
description:
**Gameplay:** Creating a cat has never been easier!  Just click on identical kittens, connect them together and get new types!  Go through all the stages of cats evolution and populate the planet with Party Animals!
Cats themselves generate coins - use them to buy additional cats, or boosters to improve the game!

**Content:** Discover 21 unique and cute party animals, each with a name as distinctive as their personality and a wonderful description that brings out their individual charm.

title: Safe Merge
description: A simple idle merge game, you need to merge safes with same design to make a safe more powerfull, you need to unlock all design to win the game, the design are in the right, if the game was hard you can do prestige to win more money per cicle.

title: Poppy Player Puzzle
description: Solve the riddle of this fun game. In each of the many stages of Poopy Player Puzzle, the small player must use his or her wits to direct the doll to the right keys that will release it from captivity.The goal of the game is to rescue the small doll from Poppy's clutches to progress through the levels, you'll need to keep an eye on the things in the labyrinth; pressing certain buttons may speed up the game or remove hazards.

title: Merge Home Mania
description: Welcome to an exciting game where creativity meets strategy! Merge items, build unique structures and decorate your perfect home. Use materials like stone, wood, textiles, flowers and plants to create furniture and decorations. Design beautiful rooms and show off your decorating talent!

title: Fury of the Steampunk Princess
description: Welcome to the world of the future, where style and survival go hand in hand. Help the girl create unique outfits that combine elements of post-apocalyptic chaos and steampunk technology. From armored corsets to steam accessories - the possibilities for customizing clothes in the game are extensive. Get a boost of energy for creativity and self-expression in a world where, even after the end of the world, style remains important for survival!

title: Kaboom Miner
description:
A fast-paced logical arcade inspired by classic Boulder Dash, but taken to the next level with massive chain explosions.
Your goal is simple—but dangerous: destroy all 50 explosive crates. Use falling stones, carefully placed bombs, and clever terrain manipulation to trigger devastating chain reactions. Every move matters. Push stones, move crates, build bridges from bricks, and even trap the Ghost before finishing it off.

title: Offroad Island
description: "Offroad Island" is an exciting racing game where you compete with different vehicles, earn money by completing missions, and customize your vehicles by upgrading them. Each map offers an adventure full of challenges. Are you ready for a journey full of speed and excitement?

title: Checkers
description:
Immerse yourself in classic checkers on the go! 
Enjoy strategic moves, challenging AI, and hot-seat multiplayer fun in this classic checkers game!
Dive into the timeless fun of Checkers! Experience sleek design, smart AI opponent, and thrilling hot-seat multiplayer matches in this classic board game. Master strategy and make every move count!

title: Merge Shooter
description: In "Merge Shooter," defend the galaxy by merging turrets to fight off alien invaders. Enhance your defense with special powers, navigating through levels filled with challenges. With its colorful graphics and user-friendly interface, it's an exciting adventure for all ages. Become the galaxy's hero by proving your achievements in this dynamic gameplay experience.

title: Tung Sahur Coloring
description: Tung Sahur Coloring is a colorful joyride just waiting to happen! This super fun coloring game for kids turns every blank page into a chance to sparkle with creativity. Grab your virtual crayons and get ready to dive into the world of Tung Sahur, where imagination runs wild and colors know no rules. From cheerful characters to wacky shapes, each page is your personal canvas. Fill it with the wildest colors you can think of—green suns, purple trees, rainbow hats—anything goes here!

title: Stickman vs Zombies WorldCraft
description:
Stickman vs Zombies WorldCraft is an action and adventure platform game in which you can play as a brave stick ninja. As your stickman hero, your mission is to wipe all the craft zombies. Along the way, you'll find money that you may use to unlock cool new skins.

Navigate the map in search of zombies before they track you down and rush you or open fire on you. Keep going, for the zombie craft will attempt to catch you if you leave even one alive.

title: Run Friends
description:
'RUN FRIENDS' is a game where beautiful heroines run to save planets in danger. 
Rescue the various creatures (Friends) on each planet, threatened by the cosmic villain Vegapunk, and save the planets. 
Are you ready to run alongside these beautiful heroines?

title: Block Blasty Saga
description:
Place the blocks on the board and crush them all! Complete the lines with the various block shapes and blast them all! Get ready to become the block master!

Play the game in two modes: classic way and adventure mode. Try to achieve the highest score in Classic mode by blasting the most block amount, it is an infinite game mode and increases the fun with ASMR sounds. In Adventure mode, complete the tens of chapters and improve your block-crushing skills step by step. Join the saga now!

title: Baby Penguin Fishing
description: Tiny Fishing is a fun and addictive 2D puzzle fishing simulation game that challenges your skills. Enjoy this charming game as you explore a fishing adventure. The game has two modes: Fishing and Trawling. In Fishing mode, you cast your line by clicking on each fish’s body and catch them quickly to advance to the next level. In Trawling mode, you release the net by clicking on the desired area and capture everything within it. You also have to complete the objective fast.

title: Stellar Style Spectacle Fashion
description: Stellar Style Spectacle Fashion invites you to prep four besties for a futuristic red carpet bash. Your mission: choose attention-grabbing outfits from a virtual wardrobe of holographic gowns, metallic accessories, experiment with gravity-defying hairstyles, and glowing-in-the-dark makeup, and avant-garde accessories. Immerse yourself in a world of creativity, innovation, and stellar fashion. Ready to make a statement on the most spectacular runway of the future? let the fashion spectacle begin!

title: Dream Mania Happy Match
description: Ready to begin a fantastic match-3 puzzle adventure? Dream Mania - Happy Match is a fun puzzle game that you won't be able to stop playing. It's easy to play, yet the challenging level design. It's a casual game you don't want to miss! Match 3 or more identical items to clear the board and hit your level goals.

title: Sprunky Incredibox Mods
description:
How many sprunki can you imagine in one game? What if they are all collected together?!
In "Sprunki Incredibox Mods" you will have access to:

-10 different mods for your sprunki
-200 sprunki skins for your favorite characters
-Unique sounds for special sprunki
-Many places for your unique group

Click play and find out what other characters are waiting for you in the game "Sprunki Incredibox Mods"!

title: Dynamons 8
description:
Embark on a brand new Dynamons adventure in Dynamons 8! This online monster collecting game includes two fresh areas to explore; Chinese Festival world and the bonus cave.

Seasoned Dynamons connoisseur Jovani will tell you everything you need to know to become a true Dynamon Captain. Encounter Robocanyx, Jaxaguar, Sauryx, Dagaryx and Tydonyx and many more special Dynamons. Recruit them for your team and beat others in thrilling 1v1 battles with special attacks and power-ups.

title: Idle Zombie Wave: Survivors
description: Idle Zombie Wave: Survivors is an intense idle survival strategy game where the undead are rising and only your leadership can turn the tide. As the world collapses under relentless zombie invasions, you must build and command a team of fearless survivors to hold the line.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: The Flowers: Merge and Sell Bouquets
description: Combine flowers in the relaxing atmosphere of a summer garden and earn coins! Sell your bouquets to customers and clear your garden of unwanted flowers with your pruning shears! Earn more coins than other players to take a place on the leaderboard!

title: Mow It
description: Mow It Harvest is a colorful simulator in which you will have a farm and your own harvester at your disposal. You need to cut grass, sell colorful hay and move on to new levels. Cut grass like a real farmer and become a millionaire in this bright, exciting game!

title: Paint Pop 3D
description:
Paint Pop 3D is an one-tap hyper casual shooting game that will keep you hooked for hours!

Tap to paint. Hold for more fun!
Stay away from obstacles and paint all slices on the ring.

Features:
- More than 1000+ levels to experience game play.
- A lot challenging missions.
- Various characters & themes.
- Beautiful graphic.

title: Pirates Mahjong
description: Pirates Mahjong is a classic tile-matching game featuring challenging levels. Match pairs of pirate-themed tiles to clear the board, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden tiles along the way. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and pirate fans alike, Pirates Mahjong offers endless fun and excitement on the high seas!

title: 2048 - Blocks destruction
description: 2048 - Blocks destruction is endless fun! Rules are simple: shoot balls, destroy blocks and grow numbers. Get balls with bigger numbers and reach higher scores! Get a lot of balls or merge them and increase damage drastically!

title: Slicer Duo
description: Slicer Duo is a satisfying ASMR game where precision, timing, and rhythm come together in a sharp slicing adventure. Move through level-based stages, cut through fruits and all kinds of objects, collect points, and try to keep your knife in motion for as long as possible. While the controls are simple, every section demands focus because one bad move can send your knife straight into danger.

title: Obby Prison: Craft Escape
description: The game that will test your survival instincts and creativity. Will you be able to escape from prison? Survive and escape!

title: Truck Stack Colors
description: Get ready for an exciting challenge. Truck Stack Colors takes you into a wonderful world of parkour and truck stacking. In attractive levels, advance by stacking platforms that are the same color as the truck. To master the balancing and stacking skills to build amazing truck towers and climb even higher.

title: Witch & Fairy BFF
description: Two unusual girlfriends - a Fairy and a Witch - study together, although they are so different. Fairy, with her delicate pink outfits and impeccable sense of style, is always ready to offer fashion tips and create vivid images. Her girlfriend-Witch, who prefers a Gothic style, chooses mysterious and gloomy outfits. Players will be able to help both heroines choose outfits for various events. Join magical friends in their exciting fashion adventure where style and magic go hand in hand!

title: Daily Horoscope HD
description: Daily Horoscope HD offers personalized daily horoscopes at your fingertips. Click on your zodiac sign to uncover insights into your day, with the option to watch an ad for access to other sign readings.

title: Rocket Sky!
description: In Rocket Sky! you tap and hold the screen to launch your rocket as far into the sky as you can. Make sure not to overheat though, otherwise it’s game over!

title: Circuit Master
description: Circuit Master is a puzzle game where you aim to get a green light by connecting the circuit correctly! Arrange the wires, fans, and machines in the right places, then turn on the button to see the electricity flow. Only the correctly connected circuit will make the green light shine. Use hints if you need help.

title: Flight Sim Air Traffic control
description: Flight Sim is a game where you have to guide aircraft to their landing zones, keep the skies safe to complete the levels to get high score.

title: Ellie's Recipe: Dubai Chocolate Bar
description: Whip up luxury in Ellie’s Recipe: Dubai Chocolate Bar! Help Ellie create rich, decadent chocolate treats in this fun, interactive cooking game. Gather ingredients, prepare molds, make gourmet fillings, and craft elegant chocolate bars with Dubai flair. Unlock stylish outfits for Ellie and enjoy hands-on cooking fun with real kitchen actions. From mixing to decorating, every step is sweet! Play now and become a luxury dessert pro with Ellie!

title: Penguin Adventure
description: Join the penguin’s adventure in Penguin Adventure! You will play as a penguin who must reach the castle in each level. You will explore three worlds, each with its own challenges and surprises. You will also have to control the penguin’s actions. You will collect stars and hearts along the way, which will affect your score and rewards. You will need enough yellow stars to unlock the next world. Penguin Adventure is a game that will test your reaction and strategy. Don’t miss this fun game!

title: Unicorn Find The Differences
description: Unicorn Find The Differences is a magical spot-the-difference game designed to test your observation skills and bring a bit of fantasy into your day! Each level offers beautifully crafted images with subtle differences that make every game exciting and engaging. Perfect for both kids and adults, this game is a delightful way to relax, challenge your attention to detail, and enjoy charming unicorn illustrations. See if you can spot all the differences and reach the next level of mythical fun!

title: Family Tree Puzzle
description:
Get ready to dig into the family history and piece together the puzzle! In Family Tree Puzzle, you’ll be presented with a set of clues that will challenge your problem-solving skills and test your ability to think critically.

Using the given information, assemble the family tree by connecting the dots between relatives and ancestors.

title: Kiss O Neck
description:
Kiss O Neck: Stretch, Kiss, and Laugh Out Loud
Each level brings a new, funny, and totally unexpected situation.
You never know what’s going to happen when you stretch that neck a little further

title: Tales of Lagoona
description: Embark on a magical Hidden Object adventure beneath the waves! In Coral Bay, the New Anemone Orphanage is in danger of closing – only you can save it. Search beautiful underwater scenes for hidden treasures, sell your finds at the market, upgrade the orphanage, play 160 mini-games, and take on quests from the townsfolk. Join Islabelle the Mermaid in a heartwarming quest to rescue the orphans!

title: Tile Fruits
description: In Tile Fruits, embark on a delectable adventure packed with vibrant fruits and captivating challenges! This 2D tile-matching game tests your strategic prowess as you aim to connect three identical fruits to advance through progressively difficult levels. Each match removes the fruits from the board, but beware: having more than seven different types of fruits on the board at once results in a loss.

title: Hydro Racing 3D
description: Would you like to participate in a great boat racing game with Hydro Racing 3D? Not only racing but also lots of free map activities and exciting career mode chapters are waiting. The boats are shiny and faster than each other. The nitrous fuel makes them faster and stronger. Get in your place in the water parkour and start either racing or free driving in single or 2 player mode. Let the speedboat adventure begin!

title: Geometry Open World
description: Geometry Open World is a fast-paced 2D action game where players pilot a ship through perilous obstacles, engage in thrilling battles against diverse enemies, and take on epic boss fights. With a vibrant and dynamic open world, strategic upgrades, and powerful abilities, you can chart your own path to triumph. Will you conquer the challenges, defeat the bosses, and rise to become the ultimate champion in this open-world geometric action adventure?

title: Shoot The Bottle
description:
You’re at an abandoned gas station with really nothing else to do. Why not grab a couple rounds to kill time.

In this immersive 3D game, your goal is simple: shoot as many bottles as you can. With limited time, precision, and speed are key to achieving the highest score. 

Tap or click to shoot the bottles. Shoot fast, shoot accurate to get the best score!

title: Summer Connect
description: You can test your pattern detection skills in this relaxed mahjong & connect puzzle game with summer theme. You can eliminate pair of same tiles. The line connecting the two clicked tiles can't have more than 2 corners. Some levels the tiles can auto slide( to left, to right, to up, to bottom). Can you clear the board before time runs out? Enjoying matching summer tiles with 30 puzzle stages in this game.

title: Fruit Jam - Merge Puzzle Game
description:
Fruit Jam - Merge Puzzle Game
Swipe fruits, blast combos & solve hundreds of juicy match-3 puzzles! Fun for all ages with vibrant graphics, daily rewards, offline play & no time limits. ?? Perfect for quick play or long sessions. Match, crush & enjoy!

Play now and test your brain!

title: Tricky Life
description:
Welcome to Tricky Life, the funniest brain test puzzle game ever made!
Here, logic meets laughter every level is designed to make you giggle, think twice, and smile when you finally find the answer.

title: Hexa Puzzle Master
description: Hexa Puzzle Master is a fun and addictive web puzzle game where players fit hexagonal blocks into a grid. With simple drag-and-drop controls, players must think strategically to complete levels without gaps. Featuring multiple difficulty levels and a sleek design, the game offers a relaxing yet challenging experience for puzzle lovers of all ages!

title: Blue Girls Makeup
description: Experience the beauty world like never before with our Blue Girls Makeup game. It's time to unravel your creative side and weave makeup wizardry! This game allows you to dip your brush into a palette of possibilities, from stunning eyeshadow shades to gorgeous lipstick hues. Play it today and get the chance to experiment with different makeup techniques and spark your imagination. The Blue Girls Makeup game brings fun and fashion right at your fingertips. Dive in now!

title: City Bike Racing Champion
description: Let's ride some bikes in the Champions City with cool bikes against other riders or with your friend in the 2-player game mode in the City Bike Racing Champion game! Lots of bikes, bags, helmets, costumes, and many other customization options await you. Play either single or 2-player and have some fun in Champions City. Participate in races or ride on the huge free map and do some stunts. Let's ride!

title: Dragon Escape
description: The cute dinosaur wants to reach the exit by eating Sandwich in the area protected by robots. If you want to help him, try to pass the levels by using laser traps without entering the robots' field of vision.

title: Zombie Road
description:
In a world where the dead walk, the real challenge is getting smash them all with your car.
Even the apocalypse can’t stop the Zombie driver. Outfit your car with defenses, smash through the undead and reach the end.

title: Sprunki Coloring Book
description:
Dive into a colorful adventure with Sprunki Coloring Book, a delightful game designed for kids and adults alike. Choose from a wide variety of adorable Sprunki characters, captivating landscapes, and fun designs to color your way. Whether you're a budding artist or simply looking to relax, Sprunki Coloring Book offers endless possibilities for self-expression.
Start coloring today and discover the joy of creativity with Sprunki Coloring Book!

title: What's In My Bag?
